name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20Oakman?=
subject: Get Ready for Gov. Holcomb's State of the State, Part 1
body:
This Tuesday, Jan. 14, Governor Eric Holcomb will deliver his fourth State of the State Address, the final one of his first term...

http://indiana.gop/congressofcounties?mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Get Ready for Governor Holcomb's
State of the State
Looking Back on 2017
Good evening!

This Tuesday, Jan. 14, Governor Eric Holcomb will deliver his fourth State of the State Address, the final one of his first term.

Eric is Putting People First, and has been since day one of his administration. Of course, a leader doesn’t just give speeches -- a leader acts, and looking back on the previous three State of the State addresses he’s given, it’s quite clear that the governor says what he means and follows through with action.

In these days leading up to the 2020 State of the State, we wanted to take a look back on some of the goals the governor set in previous addresses and the results he’s achieved for Hoosiers. Let's start with 2017.

First State of the State Address: January 17, 2017:

Goal: “While we can take genuine pride in being ‘The Crossroads of America,’ roads need upkeep, and Hoosiers and Hoosier businesses require stronger connections than ever before.”
* Result: The governor created Next Level Roads (https://www.insideindianabusiness.com/story/35878621/holcomb-unveils-next-level-roads-plan?mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , Indiana’s long-term, fully-funded infrastructure program that will maintain and improve Indiana’s roads and bridges for a quarter century.

Goal: “(We must) continue to manage our finances with the discipline we’ve shown over the past 12 years... that’s why I support a balanced budget amendment!”
* Result: Balanced budget amendment ratified in Indiana’s (https://www.ibj.com/articles/71219-indiana-voters-ok-balanced-budget-amendment?mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) constitution in 2018.

Goal: “We’ll grow our 21^st Century economy by investing in and nurturing entrepreneurship, innovation and technology pursuits.”
* Result: Creation of Next Level Fund (https://www.nextlevelindianafund.com/?mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , $250 million to support Indiana’s entrepreneurial community (https://www.ibj.com/articles/63538-tech-leaders-say-theyre-pleased-with-legislative-session?mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

Goal: “I’m asking you to authorize funding to strengthen our connection to our...world... and incentivize more direct flights to better connection Hoosiers to... international markets.”
* Result: Indiana’s first nonstop international flight, from Indy to Paris, took off in May 2018 (https://www.wthr.com/article/from-indy-to-paris-delta-offers-hoosiers-a-direct-flight-to-paris-starting-today?mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

Goal: “We’re going to attack (drug addiction) on all fronts: prevention, treatment and enforcement.”
* Result: Overdose deaths have declined 12.9% (https://indianapublicmedia.org/news/how-did-indianas-overdose-rate-drop-12-last-year.php?mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) in Indiana.

Goal: “We’ll honor our veterans and their service by exempting their pensions from state income tax.”
* Result: Veteran pensions will be Indiana state income tax free by 2024 (https://www.wfyi.org/news/articles/military-pensions-fully-exempt-from-indiana-income-tax-within-four-years?mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

That’s just a sampling of the results Governor Holcomb promised and delivered from his first State of the State speech in 2017. You can read and view his first one at this link (https://www.in.gov/gov/2918.htm?mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=49f2e6180e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) . Tomorrow, we'll take a look at Governor Holcomb’s 2018 State of the State address.

And remember, the governor’s 2020 State of the State speech is this Tuesday, Jan 14 at 7:00 p.m. ET/6 p.m. ET. As you’re making plans on where to watch the speech, consider attending one of these watch parties, which will include a presentation from a member of our Holcomb campaign team updating you on our campaign's grassroots efforts (most parties start at 6 p.m. ET/5 p.m. CT):

**Our campaign raised over $80,000 in Q4, thanks to an amazing swell of grassroots support.** Our total fundraising since August is $136,000, with $82,000 cash on hand going into the final quarter of the primary.

**We run a lean and efficient operation - our office is a converted garage.** Our campaign maximizes volunteer energy, and prioritizes using our talented network of supporters ahead of paid consultants.

Every additional dollar we receive will go directly towards empowering our canvassers and phone-bankers to reach voters, spreading our message of class struggle. (Yard signs will be available soon!)
---
| **We are beyond grateful for the solidarity you have shown us. **Rest assured that we are empowered to do all that we need to win. That said, we are not going to get complacent. We need to continue fundraising at our current pace so that we are fully equipped for get-out-the-vote.
In solidarity,

Mike Nachbar

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: This fight is of national significance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
When Beto launched Powered By People, a lot of folks asked us: “Why should
I care about what happens in Texas?” Give us a second to lay out the
reasons:

* Texas is changing. It’s on the verge of flipping blue. For decades,
Texas has been the largest Republican stronghold in the U.S. Now its
38 electoral college votes and 36 seats in Congress are in play.

* We’re just 9 seats away from flipping the Texas House. Out of 150
seats, that’s all we need to take control of Texas’ legislature. BIG
implications for the nearly 1-in-12 Americans who live in this state.

* Texas is ground zero for the fight on climate change and health care.
Texas is the state with the most oil and gas, but it’s also the state
building the most wind energy. Plus, it’s the largest state where a
Republican government hasn’t yet expanded Medicaid under Obamacare.

Beto and our entire Powered By People team are going all in on the most
important special election happening right now in Texas — Eliz Markowitz’s
race for Texas HD 28. The election is just weeks away, and we’ve assembled
a team to knock 10,000 doors this weekend.

But we need your help to fund this critical local organizing work that has
huge national implications. This weekend alone we are hoping to get more
than 400 volunteers mobilized, and that takes significant resources.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42049?refcode=ema20200109-76786&t=1001&akid=76786%2E444211%2EWGmIxI ]Can you chip in $3 to help Powered By People turn Texas blue and win
Eliz Markowitz’s special election in these final weeks? Whether you’re
from the state or not, your contributions are vitally important to our
efforts.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42049?refcode=ema20200109-76786&t=1002&akid=76786%2E444211%2EWGmIxI ]Contribute $3

In the coming weeks, we’ll be reaching out to get your help. Yes you!
Because if you’re from California, New York, West Virginia, or Idaho, you
should care about what’s happening on the ground here in Texas. It might
very well change everything about our national politics.

Thanks for all you are doing,

Powered By People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=76786%2E444211%2EWGmIxI

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

name: POLLING UPDATE
subject: NEW HAMPSHIRE: Bennet makes gains
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team - we've got great news:

[A new poll of New Hampshire voters shows Michael is gaining support!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba80a/134673f2/8e9e9ce/69976710/2221238262/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_010920_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

It's clear that our New Hampshire Investment Strategy has already started to show results.

name: Booker HQ
subject: Did you see Cory's note about dinner?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey team, Have you ever wondered about what you might ask Cory Booker if you were sitting across from him at the dinner table? Well, you might want to start thinking about it. In case you didn't see Cory's note from yesterday, **a few lucky supporters are going to be grabbing dinner with Cory on the campaign trail -- and you can be one of them!** **[Entering the contest is easy. All you need to do is chip in a few dollars to help grow our campaign and you'll automatically be entered for a chance to win.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-jan-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20200109_BHQ_20200109-fr-BHQ-EM2-SS_SS_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Cory is really looking forward to this. Best of luck!
Booker HQ _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Team, We're in the final stretch now before the Iowa caucuses next month. While I may be racing back and forth between the critical early states, Washington DC, and my home in Newark, that doesn't mean we can't find time to have dinner together. **We 're putting together something special -- a team dinner with a few lucky supporters from around the country. We'll fly you out to meet me for a meal on the campaign trail!** **[So what do you say? All you need to do is chip in right now (whatever you can!) to be automatically entered for a chance to join me and a few others for a small group dinner.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-jan-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20200109_BHQ_20200109-fr-BHQ-EM2-SS_SS_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Did you see the latest Star Wars movie? I'd love to talk with you about it over dinner (if you didn't see it, I'll keep the spoilers to a minimum). Interested in knowing what I'll do on my first day in the Oval Office? I'd be happy to tell you. Want to hear the world's greatest dad jokes? I'm ready to make you feign laughter. Prefer to talk about literally anything else instead? I'm game for that too. We'll take care of everything -- including your flights and hotel accommodations. All you have to do is show up ready for fun conversation and a great meal. **[I really do hope we'll be grabbing dinner together. Just chip in now and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to join me.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-jan-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20200109_BHQ_20200109-fr-BHQ-EM2-SS_SS_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I'd love to meet you. Excited for this,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-jan-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20200109_BHQ_20200109-fr-BHQ-EM2-SS_SS_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by February 3, 2020. Enter by contributing[here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ffb/5fca0d19/7b7525d1/291d26c3/3434250559/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-jan-dinnerwcab") or click [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ffb/5fca0d19/7b7525d1/291d26c2/3434250559/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/dinner-with-cab") to enter without contributing. Four (4) winners will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to a destination in Sponsor's sole discretion; one-night hotel accommodations for winner; opportunity to have dinner with Senator Cory Booker (approx. retail value $3,000). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). View full official rules at [https://corybooker.com/dinner-with-cory-contest-2/](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ffb/5fca0d19/7b7525d1/291d26c1/3434250559/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/dinner-with-cory-contest-2/"). Sponsor: Cory 2020, PO Box 32009, Newark, NJ 07102._
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ffb/5fca0d19/7b7525d1/291d26c0/3434250559/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ffb/5fca0d19/7b7525d1/291d26cf/3434250559/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ffb/5fca0d19/7b7525d1/291d26ce/3434250559/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ffb/5fca0d19/7b7525d1/291d26cd/3434250559/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ffb/5fca0d19/7b7525d1/291d26cc/3434250559/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ffb/5fca0d19/7b7525d1/291d26c0/3434250559/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Must-watch video: Turns out impeachment wasn’t so ‘urgent’
body:
Where’d the “urgency” go? | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=16d79e3fa7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 9, 2020
---
| | |
# **Must-watch video: Turns out impeachment wasn’t so ‘urgent’**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b880333173&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Where’d the “urgency” go?**

**House Speaker Nancy Pelosi** and her fellow Democrats spent months lecturing Americans to take impeachment seriously. They claimed it was a matter of national security—so important, in fact, that it excused rushing a sham “investigation” through the House of Representatives.

**It was the fastest impeachment** in American history. And now. . . silence.

**After months of saying** there was no time to waste, Speaker Pelosi pumped the brakes. Rather than delivering the articles of impeachment to the Senate for trial, she’s holding onto them, refusing to name the “managers” whose job will be to make the House Democrats’ case to the Senate.

**“I’ll send them over** when I’m ready,” Pelosi said today.

**This stunt** **horribly** undercuts the Democrats’ case in two big ways. First, it makes a mockery of the Constitution, which unambiguously grants the Senate the “sole power to try all impeachments.” That means Senate leaders are responsible for outlining the process they’ll follow. House leaders got to use their own rules for the impeachment inquiry and vote—they don’t get to decide how the Senate does its job, too.

**Second** , **Pelosi’s stalling** confirms the doubts of both House Republicans _and_ Democrats who voted against impeachment: There was no evidence to move forward. Not only did Democrat leaders fail to show that President Donald J. Trump broke the law; their articles of impeachment don’t even _allege_ that he committed a crime. For the first time in history, a President has been impeached for solely political reasons.

**Even Senate Democrats** are finding it hard to excuse this behavior, and a growing number of them are calling on Speaker Pelosi to end the stalling. It’s easy to see why: If even Democrats can’t take their own impeachment seriously, why should anybody else?

[“Send them over”: Dianne Feinstein tells Pelosi to end the delay](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9dc2fbd19e&e=3ee4985eea)

**Inside look:**[“Washington tries, and fails, to defend Nancy Pelosi’s failed impeachment strategy”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=249fd3a20a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **America is a nation of builders. Bureaucrats shouldn’t hold us back.**

**Better infrastructure** in every community is key to America’s future. The list includes improved roads, bridges, airports, and other major projects that currently have to go through a maze of byzantine regulations to get over the finish line.

[President Trump: My Administration is fixing this regulatory nightmare.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b902e06e04&e=3ee4985eea)

**Today, President Trump** proposed a new rule under the National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA) to ensure our infrastructure can be built in a timely, affordable manner.

**“From day one,** my Administration has made fixing this regulatory nightmare a top priority,” the President said. “We want to build new roads, bridges, tunnels, highways—bigger, better, faster, and we want to build them at less cost.”

**The outdated regulations** guiding NEPA haven’t seen a major update of this nature in more than 40 years. President Trump’s proposed rule would establish time limits of 2 years for the completion of environmental impact statements. The average time it takes right now to complete these reviews is nearly 5 years. It can drag on more than 7 years for highways.

**🎬** [President Trump: We’re trimming this daunting permitting process](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f2e974d323&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:** [“A needed update to the nation's environmental rules”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2cc86ee8a9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4ad85f46ae&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b23336a5f4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=82f9623492)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: Numbers speak louder than words

clean_body: | | | | Big news: Two new polls were just released out of South Carolina and Nevada that have Tom polling in double digits! These polls show Tom in second place in South Carolina and third place in Nevada. That’s huge! The more people hear Tom’s message about breaking the corporate stranglehold on our government, returning wealth to the American people, and addressing the climate crisis — the more they rally behind him, just like you have. Of course, this also means that he has officially qualified for the January Democratic debate. That’s thanks to the support of this team! This campaign is continuing to grow as new TeamTom members and volunteers join every day. We’re dedicated to building Tom’s momentum and are getting ready for what’s next. Thank you for being with us — we wouldn't have made it this far without you. And together, we’ll go even further. | —Tom 2020 | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! subject: Saturday is a BIG day for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
Let's do this. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=1f4cbb197c&e=f54746ec54)
---
| | | Friend, January 11th marks "Day One", the kickoff of our campaign **_all across the country_**. Nationwide, our team is stepping up to show that together, we can defeat Donald Trump in November. This Saturday, we're hosting in-person events in states all across the country: from North Carolina to California, and from Michigan to Texas. We are talking to voters at office openings, volunteer trainings, community events, block walks, and more. Will you join us? [**Find a Day One event near you so you can be a part of this important day!**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=9ad1363df5&e=f54746ec54)
---
| [ ](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=603221a5a3&e=f54746ec54)
---
| Since we announced our campaign, I've been meeting with and listening to voters across the country. Day One will show that our team is strong nationwide -- because it will take all of us to rebuild America. I am not afraid to take on the tough challenges. I'm ready to get to work. But I need you with me if we are going to defeat Donald Trump and rebuild America. [**Sign up now for one of our events across the country.**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=fa3560649d&e=f54746ec54)

name: Abigail Sigler
subject: In The News: Hagerty: The United States Must Stand With Israel
body:
## _In The News_
**Hagerty: The United States Must Stand With Israel**
**The United States Must Stand With Israel**
Bill Hagerty
[Times of Israel](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-njjdye-akrkktjik-r/)
January 9, 2020
> Like many Americans, I am deeply troubled by the rise of anti-Semitism in our country, and particularly the rise of anti-Semitic violence. In December alone, we saw a number of violent attacks driven by hatred that cannot be tolerated in our county or anywhere in the world. Americans must stand with our neighbors in the Jewish community and denounce this vile hatred. It is incumbent upon all of us to call out this anti-Semitism and stand resolute against it.
> ...
> At home, we must stand with Jewish Americans, but we must also stand with the Jewish community across the globe, and that means standing firm with our ally, Israel. We have a moral obligation to protect Israel. The path to peace in the Middle East runs through a strong US-Israel relationship, and as such, the choice to stand alongside Israel is a clear one.
> ...
> Israel is a beacon of democracy and individual liberty in a region controlled by aggressive dictators. As the United States seeks to protect peace and fight for our interests across the globe, we should continue our assistance to Israel, and we ought to support peace negotiations for a two-state solution that demilitarizes Palestine and puts the two people on a path to stability and peace. Our goal must be to end the incitement of violence among the terrorist groups that are clients of the Iranian regime.There should be no doubt. The American people support the Jewish community, and we support Israel. Together -- and under President Trump's leadership -- there will be no question. We stand with you.
Read the full piece [HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-njjdye-akrkktjik-y/) | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-njjdye-akrkktjik-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-njjdye-akrkktjik-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-njjdye-akrkktjik-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-njjdye-akrkktjik-d/)
---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215
[Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-njjdye-2B93F302-akrkktjik-h) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-u-njjdye-akrkktjik-k/)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13761262/143399875/-1965911806?refcode=em_fr_2020.01.10_b1_rf_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTVlYjc1ZC1iYjMzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I_L4YarTYPwqhgMjWdwED6ghVh-uP_f4AhGB6p8gLso=) Team,

It’s only the beginning of the year, but there is already so much happening here on Team Eugene! We’re building our strategy for the next ten months, which also means we’re budgeting for the various resources we’ll need to win this seat.

**[As a people-powered campaign, everything we do is only possible because of the support of our grassroots supporters, so I wanted to take a moment to reach out to you with the opportunity to become an official 2020 Founding Donor!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13761263/143399876/1862492598?refcode=em_fr_2020.01.10_b1_rf_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTVlYjc1ZC1iYjMzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I_L4YarTYPwqhgMjWdwED6ghVh-uP_f4AhGB6p8gLso=) **

By becoming a 2020 Founding Donor, you’re helping to make sure we have the resources we need to win this district and send Eugene to Congress. In the coming months, we are going to have to invest in building a strategic field effort, hiring more staff, and creating digital and TV ads to spread Eugene’s message all across the district.

Folks, The president is on the verge of starting a war with Iran. Donald Trump is putting our security at risk more every day, and he has Mitch McConnell’s full support. We can’t sit idly by while that happens. **_**[Will you step up to become a member of our grassroots action team? Charles needs 73 people from your area to join him in calling on the rest of Congress to keep Trump in check — McConnell never will. Charles Booker is running for Senate because he knows that the only way to defeat Mitch is to start a movement of working people. name: Nick Meier
subject: When you take a look at the numbers it’s astonishing - our healthcare situation is dire and something needs to be done, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13763521/143417791/1785235803?refcode=em_header&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWFhYmQ1ZC1jMjMzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aJJS4DSEganpEZCX0389dMnezcQma1H0BrIeZpNfCQ=)
Peter,
**17.7%** \- the uninsured rate in Texas. It’s the highest in the country.
**[Our representatives are fighting for big pharma and not for us. It’s time for a change in Washington. Help us build our momentum in 2020 by chipping in today >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13763524/143417794/1785235803?refcode=110_mm1&amount=15&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWFhYmQ1ZC1jMjMzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aJJS4DSEganpEZCX0389dMnezcQma1H0BrIeZpNfCQ=)**
**111,802** \- the number of people without healthcare coverage in our district. Why? Because the cost of insurance is too high. Too many Texans are forced to choose between putting food on the table or going to the doctor.
**14** \- Texas is one of only fourteen states that voted not to expand Medicaid.
**Millions** \- millions of Texans fell through the cracks who could have been covered by the expansion of Medicaid.
The numbers speak for themselves. **[It’s time we change the way we are represented: we need elected officials who are going to put the people first. People like Elisa. Chip in to our movement to put people over party today >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13763526/143417797/1785235803?refcode=110_mm1_link2&amount=15&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWFhYmQ1ZC1jMjMzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aJJS4DSEganpEZCX0389dMnezcQma1H0BrIeZpNfCQ=)**

name: J.D.  Scholten
subject: Standing up for our families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
| **“American Consumers, Not China, Are Paying for Trump’s Tariffs”
\-- _New York Times_ **

Add your name today: Tell Congress to step up and fight for our families in this trade war. [SIGN OUR PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13763520/143417790/1726789323?ms=em20_200110_tradewarpt&refcode=em20_200110_tradewarpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFhYmQ1ZC1jMjMzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yo6uzrnyOFaLyPE9Oe7Fcoq4uo766duB6PWsECoiTuE=&emci=49eb8f7d-4d32-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=e5aabd5d-c233-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013)
---

Peter,

When reading about the trade war in the news, it’s easy to only see the big corporate names. We see how stocks rise and fall, how companies gain or lose money, and how CEOs react to the news. But that’s not the full story.

**The truth is, Peter, our workers are bearing the brunt of the trade war.**

I’ve heard too many stories from our farmers, our workers, our truck drivers, and our families struggling. Our friends and neighbors in Iowa and across the country are collateral damage in negotiations, and it’s high time they have a fighter for them in Congress.

**[Add your name to our petition -- tell Washington to negotiate trade deals that put our workers first.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13763523/143417793/1726789323?ms=em20_200110_tradewarpt&refcode=em20_200110_tradewarpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFhYmQ1ZC1jMjMzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yo6uzrnyOFaLyPE9Oe7Fcoq4uo766duB6PWsECoiTuE=&emci=49eb8f7d-4d32-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=e5aabd5d-c233-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013)**
[SIGN OUR PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13763525/143417796/1726789323?ms=em20_200110_tradewarpt&refcode=em20_200110_tradewarpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFhYmQ1ZC1jMjMzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yo6uzrnyOFaLyPE9Oe7Fcoq4uo766duB6PWsECoiTuE=&emci=49eb8f7d-4d32-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=e5aabd5d-c233-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013)
This trade war is not working in our favor. Our negotiators went into it without allies -- and our farmers, manufacturers, and consumers paid the price. As a result, we haven’t addressed what we were told were the primary reasons for the trade war in the first place: intellectual property theft, currency manipulation, and anti-competitive subsidies. Now, our people are even worse off than before.

John Deere is laying off employees here in Iowa. Families are forced to rent out their century farms and dairy corporations are in talks to consolidate. Our hardest workers are suffering from crippling debt and bankruptcy. When the current administration steps in to help, most of the relief goes to the largest and wealthiest farms.

Meanwhile, corporate lobbyists are raking in millions off this crisis and politicians in Washington are taking their PAC money -- they care more about their campaign war chest than the livelihoods of their constituents.

I hear heartbreaking stories like this all the time on the campaign trail here in Iowa’s 4th district. **We can’t let these folks suffer any longer -- we need to take action.**

**[Sign our petition today: Tell Congress to step up and fight for our families in this trade war.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13763531/143417808/1726789323?ms=em20_200110_tradewarpt&refcode=em20_200110_tradewarpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFhYmQ1ZC1jMjMzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yo6uzrnyOFaLyPE9Oe7Fcoq4uo766duB6PWsECoiTuE=&emci=49eb8f7d-4d32-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=e5aabd5d-c233-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013)**

Standing Tall for All,

J.D. Scholten

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13763534/143417832/-52674191?refcode=em20_200110_tradewarpt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFhYmQ1ZC1jMjMzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yo6uzrnyOFaLyPE9Oe7Fcoq4uo766duB6PWsECoiTuE=)

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Have questions, concerns, or ideas? Simply reply to this email — we love hearing from supporters! You can also connect with the campaign on social media: Like us on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13763536/143417835/-579313244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFhYmQ1ZC1jMjMzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yo6uzrnyOFaLyPE9Oe7Fcoq4uo766duB6PWsECoiTuE=&emci=49eb8f7d-4d32-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=e5aabd5d-c233-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013) or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13763541/143417838/-1912497674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFhYmQ1ZC1jMjMzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yo6uzrnyOFaLyPE9Oe7Fcoq4uo766duB6PWsECoiTuE=&emci=49eb8f7d-4d32-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=e5aabd5d-c233-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013). Email is one of the most important ways we stay in touch with supporters like you, so we'd hate to see you go; but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/49eb8f7d-4d32-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f/e5aabd5d-c233-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFhYmQ1ZC1jMjMzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yo6uzrnyOFaLyPE9Oe7Fcoq4uo766duB6PWsECoiTuE=&id=109918160&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) from Scholten4Iowa emails.

name: John Hutchison for Supreme Court
subject: ENDORSEMENT: Charleston Professional Firefighters Endorse Hutchison
body:
https://www.justicehutch.com/donate [https://www.justicehutch.com/donate]
The Committee to Keep Justice John Hutchison is proud to announce that Justice Hutchison has received the endorsement of the Charleston Professional Firefighters IAFF Local 317 for Justice of the West Virginia Supreme Court of Appeals, Division 3.
https://www.justicehutch.com/donate [https://www.justicehutch.com/donate]
In making their endorsement Charleston Professional Firefighters President Myron Boggess said: “We extend this endorsement with the belief that you represent the best interest of Firefighters.”
“Our firefighters and first responders put their lives on the line for us every day. When the alarm bell rings they never hesitate to answer the call. They, and all West Virginians, deserve a judiciary that works just as hard as they do, with the same devotion to duty and the same commitment to service. I'm proud and honored to have their support and will always strive to be the kind of Justice that all West Virginians can be proud of” said Justice Hutchison.
Can we count on you to help out this week? We need just 11 more donors to meet this week’s donor goal? [https://www.justicehutch.com/donate]
Let’s Keep Justice John Hutchison on the Supreme Court.
Hard-working. Responsible. Caring.
Contribute [http://justicehutch.com/donate]
Connect With Us:Facebook [http://www.facebook.com/justicejohnhutchison/] Contact Info:Committee to Keep Justice Hutchison
PO Box 5176
Beckley, WV 25801
United States
Twitter [https://twitter.com/justicehutch]

subject: Wow!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=79A94A1A1140)
---

---
| | **FRIEND- As we begin the new year, I have to give you the biggest thank you possible.

Because of the momentum you built, we not only hit our fundraising goals, but we’ve secured the endorsement of the Staten Island and Brooklyn Republican Parties. We will be 100% positioned to win in November because of your help.**

---
| | A few highlights that you made possible:

* Raised more than $1,000,000 in 2019

* Raised more than $300,000 in the fourth quarter (our biggest quarter so far!)

Those are resources that will get our message out to voters and ensure that we win in November. We know it’ll be a battle, with Nancy Pelosi’s liberal money machine already backing our opponent, but we’re ready for the fight and with this head start we know we’ll win.

**Thank you for all you’ve done and for all I know you’ll continue to do to make sure that we win this race and that we take back the House of Representatives from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and her socialist squad!

Sincerely,
Nicole**

name: My Faith Votes
subject: SCOTUS Watch
body:
| | Critical updates from the current session of the Supreme Court
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7Mr7YWhcCY59Vnb12IwVhzaw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200110com01&n=1)
| The 2020 Supreme Court session kicks off on January 13. The court will hear oral arguments for eight cases this month, including one case that is monumental for religious freedom. **Here are three cases this month that are worth noting:**
1. Espinoza v. Montana Department of Revenue
2. Babb v. Wilkie, Sec. of VA
3. Shular v. United States

#### Espinoza v. Montana Department of Revenue
In 2015, Montana established a new law providing a $150 tax credit per year for donations taxpayers make to scholarship granting organizations. These organizations then offer scholarships to income-eligible students to attend a private school of their choice. Recipients were initially permitted to use the funds to attend any school of their choosing, including religiously affiliated private schools. However, in 2016 the Montana Department of Revenue enacted a new rule prohibiting scholarship recipients from choosing religious schools. The rule was challenged by families of scholarship recipients who argued that the rule violated their constitutional right to free exercise of religion. They argued that because the tax credit only incentivizes taxpayers to make private donations towards the scholarship fund, there is no public funding used directly for religious schools. The Eleventh Judicial District Court of Montana ruled in favor of the families. However, upon appeal, the Montana Supreme Court reversed the Eleventh Court’s ruling and dismissed the free exercise clause and deemed the scholarship program violated the “no aid” constitutional provision for religiously affiliated schools. The families appealed to the U.S. Supreme Court writing that the Montana Supreme Court’s ruling, "deepened the long-standing split on whether barring religious options from student-aid programs violates the federal Religion and Equal Protection Clauses." This case carries broad implications for Christians and religious institutions across the nation. **The central question in this case:** [Does it violate the Religion Clauses or Equal Protection Clause of the United States Constitution to invalidate a generally available and religiously neutral student-aid program simply because the program affords students the choice of attending religious schools](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=RDRHk6ni7OvEv8Bu9zj6hKsicIx_xBx1mr6i2d95lA0AXDThiDJ9dCBonAGAIPal6fzB2ttrMaTVjPjhWQhXl9C3YhXbqnr5iee5PnQso0s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200110com01&n=2)? Oral arguments for this case will be heard on January 22, 2020.
#### Babb v. Wilkie, Sec. of VA
Dr. Noris Babb, a pharmacist working at the Department of Veterans Affairs Center in Bay Pines, Florida, sued the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) over their decisions affecting her job duties. Dr. Babb alleged age discrimination and unlawful retaliation were to blame. The district granted summary judgment to the VA secretary and rejected Dr. Babb’s claims. The U.S. Court of Appeals for the Eleventh Circuit affirmed, stating that Babb could not show that age discrimination was a but-for reason for the VA’s employment decisions. However, the Eleventh Circuit wrote if it had not been for prior circuit precedent that it might have sided with Dr. Babb. The Supreme Court was petitioned for review; Dr. Babb argues the Eleventh Circuit Court’s decision disadvantaged federal employees under the Age Discrimination in Employment Act (ADEA) of 1967 and Title VII of the Civil Rights Act of 1964. The Age Discrimination in Employment Act requires that federal agencies’ “personnel actions affecting employees ... who are at least 40 years of age ... shall be made free from any discrimination based on age.” The ADEA federal-sector provision is different than the private-sector ADEA provision. The private-sector provision prohibits discrimination against an individual because of the individual’s age. However, the federal-sector provision requires decisions to be made without any discrimination based on age. **The central question in this case:** [Whether the federal-sector provision of the Age Discrimination in Employment Act of 1967, which provides that personnel actions affecting agency employees aged 40 years or older shall be made free from any "discrimination based on age," 29 U.S.C. §633a(a), requires a plaintiff to prove that age was a but-for cause of the challenged personnel action](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=RDRHk6ni7OvEv8Bu9zj6hOEhxrPb4niPwIxr__mSNvaY3lcalyy5DN0rLZeJ75kv&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200110com01&n=3). Oral arguments for this case will be heard on January 15, 2020.
#### Shular v. United States
In Florida, Eddie Shular, a convicted felon, pleaded guilty to possession of a firearm and possession of a controlled substance. He had six previous drug convictions and therefore was classified as an armed career criminal. However, Shular disagreed with the classification arguing that his prior convictions were not “serious drug offenses” citing the Armed Career Criminal Act (ACCA). Both the Northern District Court in Florida and the Eleventh Circuit Court ruled against Shular’s objection. Shular then appealed to the U.S. Supreme Court arguing the Eleventh Circuit Court should not have used a categorical approach to interpret “serious drug offenses.” The Supreme Court will review the “categorical approach”, the process of evaluating which state offenses should require additional federal sentencing. **The central question in this case:** [Whether the determination of a "serious drug offense" under the Armed Career Criminal Act requires the same categorical approach used in the determination of a "violent felony" under the Act](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=RDRHk6ni7OvEv8Bu9zj6hJjBpYYAtHwaDASDTKCkIpoak8uaKF-rDCG3FStVh0Hw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200110com01&n=4). Oral arguments for this case will be heard on January 21, 2020. **Please continue to be in prayer for our Supreme Court Justices this month. Pray specifically for religious freedom to be protected and upheld in the Espinoza v. Montana Department of Revenue case being heard by the Supreme Court on January 22, 2020.** If Christians want to see our Constitution and faith protected in the public square, we must faithfully pray over these vital decisions. We encourage you to pray this scripture over our Supreme Court Justices and your own life. | | _“Teach me, Lord, the way of your decrees, that I may follow it to the end.
Give me understanding, so that I may keep your law and obey it with all my heart.
Direct me in the path of your commands, for there I find delight.
Turn my heart toward your statutes and not toward selfish gain.
Turn my eyes away from worthless things; preserve my life according to your word.
Fulfill your promise to your servant, so that you may be feared.
Take away the disgrace I dread, for your laws are good.
How I long for your precepts! In your righteousness preserve my life.”_ Psalm 119:33-40
---|---
* * *

name: Leah, Team MJ Hegar
subject: Special interests, Mitch McConnell, and vulnerability
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907bb/7f51f7bc/4aef3a9e/4ef02c36/2455764599/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter -- On December 31, we closed the books on the last fundraising quarter of 2019. You came through in a big way, helping us to smash through our goal -- **_thank you!_**

In just a few weeks, our numbers (and our opponents' numbers) will become public. Based on Sen. Cornyn's last few reports, we have every reason to believe he'll have another _huge_ fundraising haul. | We need to be ready to fight back.
**Will you pitch in right now to help prepare?** **[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907bb/7f51f7bc/4aef3a9e/4ef02c35/2455764599/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200110.1nd__730__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---
There are cut and dry reasons why Sen. Cornyn keeps raking in the cash -- and it's not some surge of grassroots enthusiasm to reelect an 18-year incumbent.

For one, **Cornyn has spent nearly two decades selling Texans out to special interests** from the gun lobby to Big Pharma. So now those special interests are spending big to keep him in office because for them, Sen. Cornyn's reelection is an investment in their future profits.

**Sen. Cornyn may have special interests and corporate PACs in his corner, but MJ is relying on _you_ to win this election. [Donate now to help MJ _beat_ Sen. Cornyn >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907bb/7f51f7bc/4aef3a9e/4ef02c35/2455764599/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200110.1nd__730__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Here's another reason: **Sen. Cornyn is vulnerable.** In fact, _Roll Call_ ranked him one of the top ten most vulnerable senators in 2020! Mitch McConnell knows that in order to keep his stranglehold on Washington, he needs Sen. Cornyn there as his #2 -- so McConnell and his cronies plan to pour money into Texas to try to buy Cornyn's reelection.

**We 're not going to let them. Together, we're building the Texas-sized campaign we need to defeat Sen. Cornyn and his big-money backers once and for all. [Will you make a donation today?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907bb/7f51f7bc/4aef3a9e/4ef02c35/2455764599/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200110.1nd__730__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks for being part of it, Peter.

Leah Lacure
Digital Director

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907bb/7f51f7bc/4aef3a9e/4ef02c35/2455764599/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200110.1nd__730__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch
subject: See you at convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Happy New Year, Indiana Republicans! We’re starting this next decade strong and are ready for 2020 to be a monumental year for our state and nation | |
---
| |
---|---|---
Friend,

Happy New Year, Indiana Republicans!

We’re starting this next decade strong and are ready for 2020 to be a monumental year for our state and nation. I know I don’t need to tell you that Governor Holcomb and I will be on the ballot again in November, asking you and your neighbors to give us four more years of Putting People First!

Our campaign is already firing on all cylinders. In July of last year, we began our reelection campaign in front of a packed, standing-room-only crowd at the historic Hoosier Gym in Knightstown. A few months after that, thanks to the strong network of grassroots supporters like you, we were the fastest campaign in recent memory to secure enough signatures to make the ballot. We finished 2019 with record fundraising numbers, giving us the resources to share Governor Holcomb’s record of Putting People First with Hoosiers in all corners of our state.

Being Eric Holcomb’s governing partner since 2017 has been the honor of a lifetime, and I’m excited to do that for four more years! However, to get there, I need YOU to sign up to be a delegate at the **[2020 Indiana Republican Party State Convention.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d2878c1d215b4de6af561816f2e7abf4&_e=BsWsL0n7pRnDHvmEryU1vfLKT-ofdjssKIA7L2fntw1Fe2AzIV-84Dgz124u8_nealhcL6vX3mYC6KpVjlUROQuOkJn-ZlL7Q683oH1xCGh0dxfYXcTcKEWA3PuZC4y8aPkrXBFVHdbzv2PCKXstvSX-kVX5MGJ5vV8E0ibzN4biihscm9XSQ-AEeTLsxpYgWbEh2vv2mQrBUXvWht-3o56AwuhCyH4IcU32LAU5f-Gd36AVhaspKg098yoTfhckejScnfUQqja1gTPQQmc1GPWcDpLA6YEGoldfg2kQcwz6-jq-9j9TBR0J7hH3FftPvaeqJp79BCHLvcdFxfIgRlroCYnuqzOnggHvbo34phgSy1_ljavPbNsuY7mruFrHds525fEFnYrvliJ_9nWVftIlhiG0UAmXz1Tmzx6sIyBD6wBOnVEecrAOIzW4G1V1)** As you know, our candidate for lieutenant governor is selected at our convention by elected delegates.

**The 2020 Indiana Republican Party Convention is June 20-21 in downtown Indianapolis.**

Registration costs $100 and includes an invitation to a reception Friday night hosted by Governor Holcomb, our campaign team and me. To learn more about becoming an Indiana Republican Party State Convention delegate, email Greg Lannan at **[glannan@holcombforindiana.com](mailto:glannan@holcombforindiana.com?subject=2020 Convention "glannan@holcombforindiana.com")****[.](mailto:glannan@holcombforindiana.com "glannan@holcombforindiana.com")**

I look forward to seeing you at the convention, and I hope I can count on your support and continued efforts so Governor Holcomb and I can give Indiana four more years and keep Putting People First!

Sincerely,
Suzanne Crouch
Lt. Governor, State of Indiana
---

I know I don’t need to tell you that Governor Holcomb and I will be on the ballot again in November, asking you and your neighbors to give us four more years of Putting People First! Our campaign is already firing on all cylinders. In July of last year, we began our reelection campaign in front of a packed, standing-room-only crowd at the historic Hoosier Gym in Knightstown. A few months after that, thanks to the strong network of grassroots supporters like you, we were the fastest campaign in recent memory to secure enough signatures to make the ballot. We finished 2019 with record fundraising numbers, giving us the resources to share Governor Holcomb’s record of Putting People First with Hoosiers in all corners of our state. Being Eric Holcomb’s governing partner since 2017 has been the honor of a lifetime, and I’m excited to do that for four more years! However, to get there, I need YOU to sign up to be a delegate at the As you know, our candidate for lieutenant governor is selected at our convention by elected delegates. The 2020 Indiana Republican Party Convention is June 20-21 in downtown Indianapolis. Registration costs $100 and includes an invitation to a reception Friday night hosted by Governor Holcomb, our campaign team and me. To learn more about becoming an Indiana Republican Party State Convention delegate, email Greg Lannan at mailto:glannan@holcombforindiana.com?subject=2020 Convention "glannan@holcombforindiana.com"mailto:glannan@holcombforindiana.com "glannan@holcombforindiana.com" I look forward to seeing you at the convention, and I hope I can count on your support and continued efforts so Governor Holcomb and I can give Indiana four more years and keep Putting People First! Sincerely, Suzanne Crouch Lt. Governor, State of Indiana | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Team Warren
subject: Can you chip in $2 or anything you can right now to help hit our weekly fundraising goal?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
In 2020, we'll be disclosing our fundraising numbers on a monthly basis -- and that means our January fundraising numbers will be our last opportunity to demonstrate the strength of our grassroots... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ba2e/45c30650/1ee82ab10/66fca5fe/2451556284/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Now that 2020 has begun, campaigns will be reporting fundraising numbers publicly each month, instead of every quarter.

**We were outraised last quarter by some of the other candidates in the race. That means that January needs to be our strongest fundraising month yet, so our team is setting weekly goals to hit and stay on track before the FEC deadline at the end of the month.**

[**We have until midnight tomorrow to hit our goal for this week. Can you please chip in $2 right now to help hit this important goal and make our first month of 2020 strong?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ba2e/45c30650/1ee82ab10/66fca5e2/2451556284/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjM0Rl9FR1JfR09MX1RfMjAyMDAxMTBfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN34F_EGR_GOL_T_20200110_V1S3_P")

>
Our fundraising goal for January is ambitious, and that's because of all the work we need to do this month.

With the Iowa caucuses and early voting contests just days away, now is the time to be knocking on doors, making calls, buying ads, and connecting with as many voters as possible -- and we're relying on grassroots support to do it all.

**So when you make your first donation right now, you'll help hit this critical weekly goal, and also help provide all the resources we need to accomplish all of the outreach, advertising, and organizing that needs to get done right now.**

[**Can you chip in $2 or anything you can right now to help hit our weekly fundraising goal and make all of this work possible?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ba2e/45c30650/1ee82ab10/66fca5e2/2451556284/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjM0Rl9FR1JfR09MX1RfMjAyMDAxMTBfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN34F_EGR_GOL_T_20200110_V1S3_P")

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Monsey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
After the horrific attack at a Hanukkah celebration in Monsey, which is in our district, Jewish communities everywhere are hurting. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EwE/ni0YAA/t.2ya/kTx4pywvQUC2Id9vsrsbZg/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRIc8ctk0G-2B84LyI4ptr1FZgOUwMHXR7BfqLPmsOwPJpfMrFCZvnYopbISW-2FKFBxPXrzsUr0DQbbvJuc0XuZsPUNSA2ssqShQQ1Mn07EF5PwAu7g66-2Bdd1j27a7wvecp8h6vsbxU7guYsgp2h2BFsxYYs4iFhIUOkauorJIzbfFXvcJIWAllO-2B-2Bjf6wYq-2BFptY-2B8e8UCToNPQMlNUITazUQ-3D-3D/sMNY)
Friend, **** **** After the horrific attack at a Hanukkah celebration in Monsey, which is in our district, Jewish communities everywhere are hurting. We’ve seen a rise in anti-Semitic attacks across the country over the past few years, but this one literally hit home. As someone who grew up, and still lives, only a couple of miles from Monsey, I couldn’t just sit back and say nothing. We must all stand with the Jewish community in this time of great tragedy and heartache. As a black American, I feel a special responsibility to stand alongside any community on the receiving end of bigotry and hateful violence.
So, after reflecting for a few days, I put my thoughts into words.
Earlier this week, [The Journal News published an op-ed I wrote discussing the historic relationship between the black and Jewish communities](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EwE/ni0YAA/t.2ya/kTx4pywvQUC2Id9vsrsbZg/h1/ECKKmQQT1ynTpvVJwZbpuz7sJAL-2BEGqti1kutuAXlYfnY50BJZgqC4y5-2Fr7pGumHasaczJpDaqqx4AT-2FMdCH0Q5cg0uFNIyPjc5dmdLQvmu2pu2sgrFcyK4JZ8a-2Fo02-2BOCRqCsu3hLTwzik1-2BI13Hl-2BTnTsg2fy3-2BAwVPE5NVp-2FB3Vy6IT5WjfDLcoLsFEIBZM-2BzzszXsG5bB6OAzmR2gU29HRX66qHzAqWfMO026zPkgmq2ghOFv7AWhZcDq4mJPvpeXXyMEqjURLx6i93K1OvKsDy8Jli9kty1-2BsCHqrnQ-2F-2BiZLS9o64WvszgtZqATw85nZY6-2FWA0W3pqKUS5-2FzlhLRbefsbuFOAqIvAUdDi3v-2FMm6PFBm8zoYjFQppeBoj-2Bzk1C7NI6ipBiRDh-2BKQiF8g-2BjDnTUAAE1VKKp990C2CMRuUPSxBSN8QvSdHsHcWF9K95h8JP5i9buy2-2BV1Vp1Jpl1ZwL7ocaqWTpIueie39vHhwX0kKEklCnzpcQbuZr4rlvQ-2BIG8aoTMDuDOu1UoRpgnix6AkY3-2B124y5QSBO8qEfMiVsYT0Us6v1PABFPnBY-2F9-2FZaqBeJMG7OEa1cwg-3D-3D/ct7Y), and our shared struggles throughout U.S. history. In the 1960s, Andrew Goodman and Michael Schwerner, two Jewish New Yorkers, went to Mississippi to fight for civil rights and help register black voters. This was called Freedom Summer. These young men showed up for the black community and sacrificed their lives for it. Their legacy lives on to remind us of our collective struggle in the face of rising white nationalism and anti-Semitism.
Today, our Jewish brothers and sisters need our support. During times like these, we have to band together and stand in solidarity, from however many miles away. Now, more than ever, we must stand together in the unfinished fight for social justice. We must loudly and clearly denounce anti-Semitism everywhere, educate all communities, and bring perpetrators of violence to justice. We must also devote federal resources to the security of our places of worship and to mental health treatment.
People deserve to feel safe in their community, and no one should fear violence just for being Jewish.
In solidarity,
Mondaire

[Facebook](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EwE/ni0YAA/t.2ya/kTx4pywvQUC2Id9vsrsbZg/h2/Nejq3qQQ6Jn1R8HM5bnp8AsJlRvyv3gSneUqeLKLznBCoz42UjHRg-2F9mAL1dFJ3ZN8IPD4fP2X5uFXKfxb57tzKRsd7Pvr0BPjZQHbS9Pc4MsAgOgiTwYeZkQjWbYpIT7Qle8NlJf3wzSPzb7U3DDRJaOlImxVfyc127QbK0AuNm9VMyw502P36Zq2y93ewY-2BKwgVMFjBFS5v6dnXxJl-2F5qEWgJVoNOgOjKbm8mLYnOsxBpKOr9WO8gh5j3pzIe9/5kNF) | [Twitter](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EwE/ni0YAA/t.2ya/kTx4pywvQUC2Id9vsrsbZg/h3/tX6tdXlLuYnKkE2jZWciQUs1NelnZQ77h2lAz4D56MK0d-2BHmR9C467oG93NvI8oCOPXW8byrXJ3EUaszrc3JN3SRafTijYTKnMFnTNIss1mjYxkopjIlhkIUlUr9rxJiTXQPUKqeB3qpoe2Kq0AhuxrGfp4BGCsP0tdv4k8n2KT0DApSw2GdMbXZseitDEPj-2F2guQwCbiAXuC3r0-2F0G7plEXrQWeuABX2KFNiyte-2Fqg-3D/JLNX) | [Instagram](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EwE/ni0YAA/t.2ya/kTx4pywvQUC2Id9vsrsbZg/h4/UgaStWBIiLYn8eevue7q8FAhcGqAoYLOwsOn0RlPD886rRcJZIsaAG91B3gZr9SeRq2v0UoQzM-2BJ5iK57OGdBLPr3PCTxJNfMNah5kreHf7pzko7lNyFGKKtXsF6X1cAHY7N25j8xqfnouVp9dMPHXWrpLR-2BP7fcalIIOBdewfpG4fLAlRwAFzZEU4jwZN4AYefzo-2BYTs93Rebujshlq9zOOJlwRgkPObgtGVZaVHzK6OcWuPh1Hk-2BawUcCwjcUo/B7Ym)

Peter --

Moments ago, Steve King gave a speech on the floor of the House of Representatives. Instead of advocating for his constituents here in Iowa, he spent 30 minutes insisting that white nationalism isn’t real and making up conspiracy theories about the Democratic Party.

White nationalism is very real and has been used to fuel mass murders across this country. Mother Emanuel AME Church, Charlottesville, Tree of Life Synagogue, El Paso, and many, many more.

And let's not forget, Steve King himself once said "White nationalist, white supremacist ... how did that language become offensive?"

**[Enough is enough. Let’s kick this guy out of office and get a real representative for Iowa’s 4th in Congress. clean_body: Peter -- Moments ago, Steve King gave a speech on the floor of the House of Representatives. Instead of advocating for his constituents here in Iowa, he spent 30 minutes insisting that white nationalism isn’t real and making up conspiracy theories about the Democratic Party. White nationalism is very real and has been used to fuel mass murders across this country. Mother Emanuel AME Church, Charlottesville, Tree of Life Synagogue, El Paso, and many, many more. And let's not forget, Steve King himself once said "White nationalist, white supremacist ... how did that language become offensive?" = | = Our district needs a representative who will stand with us in Congress on important issues from improving healthcare to helping our farmers. Instead, we have Steve King, insisting he’s being treated “like a federal felon” since he’s been sidelined by his own party for his racist remarks. Time and again, he puts his own selfish agenda above the needs of the 4th district. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = White nationalism is real, and dangerous. We have to stand strong against this hate. That’s why this election is so important. \-- Team Scholten =

| | |

| Team, last night Tom Steyer officially qualified for the January debate. Once again, it's looking like there will be more billionaires than Black people on the debate stage. And as it currently stands, **there will be no candidates of color on stage. Not a single one.** **We need Cory 's voice in this race now more than ever. The DNC's debate thresholds have systematically paved the way for a billionaire to buy his way onto the stage while pushing out candidates of color from participating.
We pride ourselves on being the party of inclusion, yet time and time again our candidates of color are cutting their campaigns short because they don't have the financial resources to continue on. We saw it with Kamala last month, and we saw it with Julian just last week.
As the only candidate who goes home to a low-income, majority-minority community in this race, Cory is running to represent the communities that are often disregarded, brushed aside, and overlooked.
It's a disservice to communities like his and many across the nation that someone who understands the pain, the struggle, and the hardships that get swept under the rug during these debates won't be heard yet again.
**[If you believe like we do that Cory should not be the next candidate of color to be pushed out of the conversation, that his voice is important in this race, donate today. This is the only way that we can compete.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200110_BHQ_20200110-fr-BHQ-EM1-ANS_ANS_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
We can do this, together.
Booker HQ

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: GOP voter suppression is already backfiring
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Florida's GOP legislature attempted to undermine a voter-approved measure restoring voting rights to former felons by imposing an unconstitutional poll tax, but their efforts to keep over a million people from voting could backfire. The four most populous counties in Florida (comprising a third of the state's population) have used a loophole in the law to waive the fees and allow hundreds of thousands to vote in 2020. This could be a game-changer and tip the scales for Democrats. In 2016, millions of Democrats stayed home or were intimidated from voting at all, and Donald Trump won Wisconsin by just 0.77%, Michigan by just 0.23% and Pennsylvania by just 0.72%. They're trying to make this happen again in 2020. That's why we need to know if your voting plans have changed: **As of today, do you plan to vote for Trump in 2020?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfd6/6e9863e8/17acfff6/1db04179/3037570513/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/omLxW2ez") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfd6/6e9863e8/17acfff6/1db04179/3037570513/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/omLxW2ez") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfd6/6e9863e8/17acfff6/1db0417f/3037570513/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200110a.ND&refcode2=LyuZULImEvt2HtABdNHX")

name: Adam Hattersley
subject: do YOU believe in climate change?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hattersley for Congress
body:
Peter,

Climate change is one of the biggest threats to economy, our national security, and our overall way of life. But our current Congressman proudly identifies as a climate change denier. Over the years, I’ve watched how Florida has been impacted by increasingly severe storms, sea level rise, toxic algae blooms, and other symptoms of climate change. Instead of fighting for our state, Ross Spano refuses to even acknoweldge that there’s an issue.

I guess it’s easy to shirk your responsibilities when you claim you don’t believe in the problem.

It’s time FL-15 has a representative that actually cares about this community’s future. Can you take our very quick survey, to let us know whether you believe in climate change? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/UFTB4e69bEiBIA8sfp0Wsw2]

SURVEY » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/UFTB4e69bEiBIA8sfp0Wsw2]

It’s time for us all to believe in a better future for FL-15.
-Adam

Adam Hattersley is Navy Veteran and local state representative working to flip Florida's 15th Congressional District.
Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Adam's campaign? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hattersley_q12020?refcode=Em_fr_2020.01.10_b1_AH_all&amount=25&recurring=auto]

Adam Hattersley is running to represent Florida's 15th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit hattersleyforcongress.com [http://hattersleyforcongress.com]
Use of Adam's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or the United States Navy.

clean_body: Peter, Climate change is one of the biggest threats to economy, our national security, and our overall way of life. But our current Congressman proudly identifies as a climate change denier. Over the years, I’ve watched how Florida has been impacted by increasingly severe storms, sea level rise, toxic algae blooms, and other symptoms of climate change. Instead of fighting for our state, Ross Spano refuses to even acknoweldge that there’s an issue. I guess it’s easy to shirk your responsibilities when you claim you don’t believe in the problem. It’s time FL-15 has a representative that actually cares about this community’s future. Can you take our very quick survey, to let us know whether you believe in climate change? [] SURVEY » [] It’s time for us all to believe in a better future for FL-15. -Adam Adam Hattersley is Navy Veteran and local state representative working to flip Florida's 15th Congressional District. Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Adam's campaign? >> [] Adam Hattersley is running to represent Florida's 15th Congressional District. Peter,

Democrats in Congress are finding new ways to attack President Trump and drag out impeachment for as long as possible.

After rushing to impeach President Trump before Christmas and take away his right to due process, Nancy Pelosi is now stalling on sending impeachment to a trial in the Senate.

Why would she do that? Because she knows he did NOTHING WRONG and this whole thing has been a complete sham from the start.

**We can’t let them continue to drag on this impeachment process. Sign our petition to tell Pelosi and House Democrats to stop stalling!**
[ **Sign the petition!** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=e5388b238bf44fb18edc9d31ab7ca423&_e=ouQnpa1rWFRY-isdAhM1PvJfHZuFHIxjD_vDG1qZD6vxw6AuiRzfulErjrUUVO-496hnTQCh9c1hXM5HRDuQC1jIkCizKjPeQgZdZ2aQ8kptzRJcnrervWFNyY-aKf-3rgp-Zcwy72tpSWEyZ6mcMy-8pIJ9VGlXatJY4w1fx9YQJgMASejxfxbXDMpFOcvq3tsa9DwnBQEA542mdMIx4OsgCpr4LxlMYmCKwD1smKq-3dgr2ySBx8TjzuTjqvFe49VnJ1ysKVUwYMuIQaJ-ndO3iWNTsxBzcRYdwKrXflbcGtcqvECzwkTsUig61lGtl9eaBOgfBCqGA59qIRH-XC-h4KIxd-Z7bxP8tFgAHsZq15DUwVhfzyGUI21-sOl124TtY9SQRb_s4zvsnV08_Xm5KRGy7evUBZiAlr9SrHL2EiicyEv0F9rSFrdkXg8M)
Nancy Pelosi claims she wants a fair trial in the Senate, but nothing about this impeachment process has been fair so far. We’ve not seen any evidence, heard from any first-hand witnesses, or given President Trump a chance to face his accuser.

Leading up to this, our very own Anthony Brindisi voted for impeachment on multiple occasions, after saying he wouldn’t! Just He turned his back on Upstate New York, and now we need to send him and the do-nothing Democrats a message.

**Tell Nancy Pelosi, Anthony Brindisi, and other pro-impeachment Democrats to send impeachment to the Senate!**
[ **Tell Democrats to send it to the Senate!** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=e5388b238bf44fb18edc9d31ab7ca423&_e=ouQnpa1rWFRY-isdAhM1PvJfHZuFHIxjD_vDG1qZD6vxw6AuiRzfulErjrUUVO-496hnTQCh9c1hXM5HRDuQC1jIkCizKjPeQgZdZ2aQ8kptzRJcnrervWFNyY-aKf-3rgp-Zcwy72tpSWEyZ6mcMy-8pIJ9VGlXatJY4w1fx9YQJgMASejxfxbXDMpFOcvq3tsa9DwnBQEA542mdMIx4OsgCpr4LxlMYmCKwD1smKo5aECmC7WZNotvQByVEB1Yp0I0PtiX8_sdnG16RfVsy8wV_ChrVcCA1t7t1r2cJ-IC7fDZvGEk1FjJKG3MTTV7qNlPru51O9P31iVj1tbjVaYhrUeglLUjFpVbU7GhOfY0mIhkKO4FWfrLA94S2m0BNbg3S_zWQp2Y5BetOV9jx0Tp1b_SF5se2bYOnJSbtAUxPocBhVliFuSFHnJOXZ27)
This SHAM witch hunt has gone on for too long. We need to stand up to the Democrats’ political games. name: Sara 2020
subject: Sign our petition: Tell Susan Collins to demand witness testimony during the Senate impeachment trial.
body:
The impeachment trial is starting.

Friends, it's starting.
**Politico: "McConnell tells Republicans he expects impeachment trial next week"**
McConnell could begin the impeachment trial as early as Monday - and thanks to Susan Collins' support, he'll be able to start the trial without any guarantee of witness testimony.
**Without witnesses, this trial will be incomplete and a sham. We 're calling for action: **
[**Sign our petition calling on Susan Collins to demand witness testimony during the Senate impeachment trial.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e68/4bef7a87/6af0c291/287f8665/4077897538/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/demand-witness-testimony-impeachment?source-em200110-1-full")
**********[SIGN THE PETITION](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e68/4bef7a87/6af0c291/287f8665/4077897538/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/demand-witness-testimony-impeachment?source-em200110-1-full")**********
McConnell wants Senators to vote on impeachment without hearing from firsthand witnesses like John Bolton and Mick Mulvaney, the acting White House chief of staff.
He's trying to hide the truth. We need you to fight back.
\- Team Sara

name: U.S. Senator Ed Markey
subject: Tell Trump: Do not go to war with Iran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
Yesterday, Ro Khanna and I led 21 lawmakers in an effort to get Donald Trump to de-escalate tensions with Iran and act to avoid war.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df93/693b8b0a/4371c98f/72de7541/2263899836/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
Yesterday, Congressman Ro Khanna and I led 21 lawmakers in a call on Donald Trump to de-escalate tensions with Iran and prevent war in the Middle East.
We sent a letter directly to the president calling out his reckless decision to assassinate General Soleimani and demanding authorization from Congress for any military action against Iran.
We need you to add your voice to ours:
**[Add your name to become a citizen co-signer and tell Donald Trump not to go to war with Iran. The American people do not want another endless war in the Middle East.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df93/693b8b0a/4371c98f/72de7540/2263899836/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/markey-no-war-with-iran?source=em200110-full")**
Donald Trump started this situation when he withdrew from the Iran Deal and imposed crushing sanctions on Iran.
Now is the time to pursue a diplomatic strategy that will defuse tensions and prevent further movement by Iran toward a nuclear-weapons program.
Our letter called on the Trump administration to take clear steps that would not only help de-escalate the situation, but would also get us off our march to war.
As part of that, we made it clear to Trump that any further military action against Iran must be authorized by Congress. We also demanded that the administration tell the public what specific "imminent threats" existed that led to this assassination -- the most extreme choice on the administration's list of options.
We also told them not to make any further threats to Iranian civilians or cultural sites. They must recognize that this action would be a war crime and violation of our international agreements.
**[If you agree that Donald Trump must cease his escalations with Iran and get us off a path to war, add your name to our letter as a citizen co-signer.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df93/693b8b0a/4371c98f/72de7540/2263899836/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/markey-no-war-with-iran?source=em200110-full")**
War with Iran would cost untold deaths and trillions of dollars. We must do everything we can to stop that from happening.
\- Ed
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df93/693b8b0a/4371c98f/72de7540/2263899836/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/markey-no-war-with-iran?source=em200110-full")**

* * *
Paid for by The Markey Committee
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df93/693b8b0a/4371c98f/72de7547/2263899836/VEsD/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://ma.edmarkey.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Senator Ed Markey with a contribution, [click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df93/693b8b0a/4371c98f/72de7546/2263899836/VEsA/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_footer").
