name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: 39 Days
body:
Good morning Peter,

With the holidays officially behind us, it is time to focus on the final course leading up to the Election Day.

That being said, we have exactly 49 days until early voting begins. This means we have 49 days to knock on 20,000 doors, call 30,000 phones, and reach 500,000 people through social media.

Your support thus far has been overwhelming and encouraging, but I still need your help if we are going to win in March.

THIS WEEKEND

My mom, my uncle, and my good friend Susana are coming into town to help stuff and address envelopes, and tomorrow, we are going block walking.

Help us keep up this momentum by coming out to block walk with us (https://www.facebook.com/events/2713534138741096/?acontext=%7B%22action_history%22%3A%22[%7B%5C%22surface%5C%22%3A%5C%22page%5C%22%2C%5C%22mechanism%5C%22%3A%5C%22page_upcoming_events_card%5C%22%2C%5C%22extra_data%5C%22%3A%7D]%22%2C%22has_source%22%3Atrue%7D&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=77c1d2b969-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_10_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-77c1d2b969-32267927) . We can't let our efforts thus far be in vain; it's time for us to come together to make the difference.
Knock on doors with Marc! (https://www.facebook.com/events/2713534138741096/?acontext=%7B%22action_history%22%3A%22[%7B%5C%22surface%5C%22%3A%5C%22page%5C%22%2C%5C%22mechanism%5C%22%3A%5C%22page_upcoming_events_card%5C%22%2C%5C%22extra_data%5C%22%3A%7D]%22%2C%22has_source%22%3Atrue%7D&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=77c1d2b969-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_10_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-77c1d2b969-32267927)
NEXT WEEK

We have ramped up our phone banking efforts, and are striving to reach more people per event than we have before. This past Wednesday, we reached out to nearly 187 people.

Even if you aren't able to block walk with us, please
come to one of our phone banks (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/197211/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=77c1d2b969-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_10_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-77c1d2b969-32267927) , which occur every Wednesday. Food and refreshments are always provided!
Phone bank Jan. 15th (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/197211/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=77c1d2b969-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_10_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-77c1d2b969-32267927)
If you aren't able to block walk or phone bank, we ask that you please donate $10 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=77c1d2b969-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_10_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-77c1d2b969-32267927) to help us print enough push cards to reach 15 doors.

Express Donate: $5 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=77c1d2b969-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_10_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-77c1d2b969-32267927)

Express Donate: $10 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=77c1d2b969-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_10_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-77c1d2b969-32267927)

Express Donate: $25 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=77c1d2b969-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_10_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-77c1d2b969-32267927)

Or, donate another amount (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?refcode=express_lane_other&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=77c1d2b969-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_10_04_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-77c1d2b969-32267927)

Yours in progress and justice,

Marc

clean_body: Good morning Peter, With the holidays officially behind us, it is time to focus on the final course leading up to the Election Day. That being said, we have exactly 49 days until early voting begins. This means we have 49 days to knock on 20,000 doors, call 30,000 phones, and reach 500,000 people through social media. Your support thus far has been overwhelming and encouraging, but I still need your help if we are going to win in March. THIS WEEKEND My mom, my uncle, and my good friend Susana are coming into town to help stuff and address envelopes, and tomorrow, we are going block walking. Help us keep up this momentum by coming out to block walk with us () . We can't let our efforts thus far be in vain; it's time for us to come together to make the difference. Knock on doors with Marc! () NEXT WEEK We have ramped up our phone banking efforts, and are striving to reach more people per event than we have before. This past Wednesday, we reached out to nearly 187 people. Even if you aren't able to block walk with us, please come to one of our phone banks () , which occur every Wednesday. Food and refreshments are always provided! Phone bank Jan. 15th () If you aren't able to block walk or phone bank, we ask that you please donate $10 () to help us print enough push cards to reach 15 doors. Express Donate: $5 () Express Donate: $10 () Express Donate: $25 () Or, donate another amount () Yours in progress and justice, Marc ============================================================ Facebook () Twitter () Link () Website () Copyright © 2020 Marc Flores for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20Oakman?=
subject: Get Ready for Gov. Holcomb's State of the State, Part 2
body:
Governor Holcomb’s fourth State of the State Address is right around the corner (this Tuesday at 7 p.m. ET)! In the days leading up to it, we’re...

http://indiana.gop/congressofcounties?mc_cid=b90c94e98e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Get Ready for Governor Holcomb's
State of the State Address
Looking Back on 2018

Good afternoon!

Governor Holcomb’s fourth State of the State Address is right around the corner (this Tuesday at 7 p.m. ET)! In the days leading up to it, we’re taking a look at Eric’s previous State of the State speeches to see how he’s delivered on the bold vision he’s laid out. Here are some examples of Governor Holcomb Putting People First in his 2018 State of the State Address.

Governor Holcomb’s 2018 State of the State Address: January 9, 2018
Goal: “(In 2017) we beat the 2012 record and secured nearly 300 business commitments that will lead to the creation of over 30,000 new jobs... so I’ve challenged the good people at the Indiana Economic Development Corporation to do it again in 2018!”
* Result: Second consecutive record breaking year for economic development (https://calendar.in.gov/site/iedc/event/iedc-2018-businesses-commit-to-creating-31000-hoosier-jobs/?mc_cid=b90c94e98e&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Goal: “We must ensure that every Hoosier student receives an education infused with STEM subjects, critical thinking skills and the intellectual curiosity that prepares them for lifelong learning.”
* Result: Indiana brings computer science to every school. (https://medium.com/@codeorg/indiana-passes-bill-to-bring-computer-science-to-every-school-f91122b7bff9?mc_cid=b90c94e98e&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Goal: “Strengthening our workforce will be one of the most important things we’ve ever undertaken. It’s going to take a long-term commitment and an all-in approach among many stakeholders in every community.”
* Result: Created Governor’s Workforce Cabinet (https://www.insideindianabusiness.com/story/37985578/holcomb-makes-appointments-to-workforce-cabinet?mc_cid=b90c94e98e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) to bring together experts from public, private, non-profit and education sectors to study and realign workforce development efforts throughout Indiana. Also increased funding (https://www.insideindianabusiness.com/story/37777330/governor-puts-pen-to-workforce-bills?mc_cid=b90c94e98e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) for Next Level Jobs training programs.

Goal: “We’re clarifying the sales tax exempt status on software as a service.”
* Result: Software as a Service exempted from state sales tax (https://fox59.com/2018/03/23/holcomb-signs-bill-exempting-software-as-a-service-from-state-sales-tax/?mc_cid=b90c94e98e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) to attract more tech firms."

Goal: “We’re moving forward to require Indiana physicians to use INSPECT before ever issuing the first prescription.”
* Result: Bill to require INSPECT (https://www.indianasenaterepublicans.com/houchin-bill-to-require-inspect-system-check-signed-by-governor?mc_cid=b90c94e98e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) system check signed by governor, which is critical to helping physicians combat the drug epidemic.

Goal: “We’ll seek to increase the number of opioid treatment locations from 18 to 27.”
* Result: Law signed to add 9 new opioid treatment (https://www.wthr.com/article/law-signed-to-add-9-new-opioid-treatment-centers?mc_cid=b90c94e98e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) centers, helping more Hoosiers on the road to recovery.

Goal: “Tonight I’m setting a goal to become the best state in the Midwest for infant mortality rates by 2024.”
* Result: Holcomb signs bill to reduce infant mortality (https://www.wfyi.org/news/articles/holcomb-signs-bill-to-reduce-infant-mortality-standardize-care?mc_cid=b90c94e98e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , standardize care.

Goal: “I met with students from Cumberland Elementary School... who have spearheaded the push for several years to adopt the Say’s Firefly as our official state insect... This is a great way for young students to be involved in the civic process...and I’m taking up their cause this year...”
* Result: The Say’s Firefly is Indiana’s state insect. (https://www.jconline.com/story/news/2018/03/23/its-official-says-firefly-indianas-state-insect/448739002/?mc_cid=b90c94e98e&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

The above represents just a sampling of what Governor Holcomb promised and delivered in his State of the State speech in 2018. You can read and view the entire 2018 address at this link (https://www.in.gov/gov/2972.htm?mc_cid=b90c94e98e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) . On Monday, we’ll look back at Governor Holcomb’s 2019 State of the State address.

And remember, the governor’s 2020 State of the State speech is this Tuesday, Jan 14 at 7:00 p.m. ET/6 p.m. ET. As you’re making plans on where to watch the speech, consider attending one of these watch parties, which will include a presentation from a member of our Holcomb campaign team updating you on our campaign's grassroots efforts (most parties start at 6 p.m. ET/5 p.m. CT):

subject: Does Mark have your endorsement?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We have a tough battle ahead but we're confident that with your support Mark will stay in the Senate and keep fighting for Virginians.
|

We're kicking our campaign into high gear now that election year is underway. We have a tough battle ahead but we're confident that with your support Mark will stay in the Senate and keep fighting for Virginians.

That's why we're getting in touch today. **[Will you give Mark your personal endorsement?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6a3/53d9897e/535f9a73/1c89d4bd/3110193309/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-endorsementpet") We need to collect as many signatures as possible to show the strength of this grassroots campaign.**

Republicans think they can win the Commonwealth in 2020 and they're working hard to do it. We need to fight hard this year to make sure that does NOT happen.

Mark is fighting to secure our elections, protect gains we've made on healthcare, and strengthen the economy for workers. He needs your support to keep fighting for Virginians in the Senate. **Can Mark count on you to personally endorse him for reelection?**

body:
Will you make an investment to change our country for the better?
|

[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1e3/18d6a294/4cdf57a4/26d636ce/4181267046/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | It's that time again -- with a new year comes new year's resolutions. As we make goals to improve our health along with our work and home lives, we should also make a goal to improve our country. [_**Chip in to our campaign and start 2020 strong ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1e3/18d6a294/4cdf57a4/26d636cf/4181267046/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme200110?refcode=jme200110_nd&amount=10&recurring=1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1e3/18d6a294/4cdf57a4/26d636cc/4181267046/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDAxMTAiLCJlM3NnWVhOck1TQjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200110?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jme200110_nd_&refcode2=107423")

---
I joined the Army after 9/11 to serve our country in a time of crisis, and that's exactly why I'm running for the Senate in Tennessee now.
We can win this critical open seat, send a leader who will stand up for what's right to Senate, and take back the Majority [_**if folks like you join our team and chip in to make it happen.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1e3/18d6a294/4cdf57a4/26d636cf/4181267046/VEsB/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme200110?refcode=jme200110_nd&amount=10&recurring=1")
_[**So as we begin 2020, will you make a new year 's resolution to change our country for the better by making a investment to elect a new kind of leader in Tennessee and flip the Senate?**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1e3/18d6a294/4cdf57a4/26d636cf/4181267046/VEsO/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme200110?refcode=jme200110_nd&amount=10&recurring=1")_
I'm not taking a dollar for corporate PACs, [_**so every little bit you give makes a big difference.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1e3/18d6a294/4cdf57a4/26d636cf/4181267046/VEsP/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme200110?refcode=jme200110_nd&amount=10&recurring=1")
Thank you,
James

name: Warren for President
subject: Tomorrow's the deadline to hit this week's goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
With the Iowa caucuses less than a month away, we need your support now more than ever. The critical work that our team is doing right now to help Elizabeth win is only possible with your support. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ba4a/45c30650/1ee7d5690/66fca85d/866772969/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
[**We're budgeting on a weekly basis, and tomorrow is the deadline to hit this week's goal. Can you please make your first donation? When you do, we'll send you a free sticker as a thank you.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ba4a/45c30650/1ee7d5690/66fca85f/866772969/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXZvdGluZy1zdGsiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjM2Rl9FR1JfR09MX1BfMjAyMDAxMTBfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-voting-stk?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN36F_EGR_GOL_P_20200110_V1S3_P")
January is an incredibly important fundraising month. We've got weekly fundraising goals that we need to hit, and we're currently keeping track of how many grassroots donations we receive _every single day_ to determine how many resources we can send to our state teams across the country.

**With the Iowa caucuses less than a month away, Elizabeth Warren needs your support now more than ever.** The critical work that our team is doing right now to help Elizabeth win is only possible with your support, and we're counting on hitting our goal this week to do all of the necessary work to win.

[**If you've been waiting for the right moment to make your first donation to this campaign, this is it. name: Tom Steyer
subject: Our immigration system doesn’t reflect our best American values. Here’s how I plan to change it:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friend, America prides itself on compassion, hard work, unity, and freedom. But our current immigration system doesn’t reflect these values. I said it on the debate stage last month, and I’ll say it again: Donald Trump isn’t against immigration — _he’s against immigration by non-white people_. And although his policies have intensified the xenophobic atmosphere we are living in, immigrants were being vilified in this country long before he assumed office. This has to change. We need to heal from the unjust, violent approach to immigration we’ve taken in the past. We must offer everyone seeking a new opportunity here the chance to thrive. [_**I hope you’ll read through the immigration plan I’ve just released — in it, I lay out how I will work to protect vulnerable immigrant communities, and ensure that those displaced by climate disasters have a home here.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BUl0OLdG5DE2SrAsntXkYjiVYL3fjra8fwMpXWYjWGmnjhZWdj118PV4zLjKUYgjSiGPyDJQSVLk81lfYq3bm6-2F-2FbgZYCWoRAUACVqeEklyr1tXbbT-2BcrJFiCAj53fW1ma4nRhazVHCPLW3hMb2qcE1Ca-2B4tXq4UFQNQYqtDuHGSQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFfVo7wPQ0sBFraSsvQHAUoNr1tf1rUhN99MQM6JvhBKQ-2Fw6IbJpyo4lq2DkVTqScflNKoArtanGbRnl48AdzEbmm8Pi38DPq9hkQGQvxFaVoh-2FukI0FQkA3ORnqSyWi4Y-2FbUiXxLCCee9-2B1q7L1irAMtc3B5cGoLkceZsCCskj7RwlIsBkKltEP05EXmbQ3imdXPTm2ivA0OTvPi1wk7yaG50SRTZMzJfKs5Ib7F8QNOtMM6qp5rwIo5r8mtp4nDebA4LCQmB-2FeSH99uhO8OQuNO5N9D-2FeTGGqvODzMR1S1-2BcdzxU79EmHRpkIwBAAl-2BJtxINHA7xyd3KBlFDizEYudazgGN6HUtjojYXPDJuZvbA-3D-3D) We can’t pretend to be a great nation when there are children dying in cages at our southern border. We can’t talk about the American Dream while millions of undocumented workers who make our economy strong live in a constant state of anxiety about being deported. We can’t preach unity and freedom when people are hunted for their status and aren’t given an equal voice in our democracy. The words inscribed on the side of the Statue of Liberty say: “Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free.” [_**This is a promise I intend to keep.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BUl0OLdG5DE2SrAsntXkYjiVYL3fjra8fwMpXWYjWGmnjhZWdj118PV4zLjKUYgjSiGPyDJQSVLk81lfYq3bm6-2F-2FbgZYCWoRAUACVqeEklyr1tXbbT-2BcrJFiCAj53fW1ma4nRhazVHCPLW3hMb2qcE1Ca-2B4tXq4UFQNQYqtDuHGSQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFfVo7wPQ0sBFraSsvQHAUoNr1tf1rUhN99MQM6JvhBKQ-2Fw6IbJpyo4lq2DkVTqScflNKoArtanGbRnl48AdzEbmm8Pi38DPq9hkQGQvxFaVoh-2FukI0FQkA3ORnqSyWi4Y8hLVSQHt8UoixFweym5Sz9yjFw-2B0zXuqUZkeqbLhdKPhPuupy3w-2F8c-2BSOe6vt51MjeatP66-2FNsiW6cP14K7WUuX5nZOsN-2BNjEMBOdGI5ny2nXODyuCOhMom-2BK6EKuE81DBucd6714D-2FlhMnJiQ1VmUffRPeaJGonIhX5yQrT8G6YFZDBjcO6dbQmgHaSe0Jx-2BwqKjIJoQ-2FagZjqhfrf2phgXbnFboUk0ru3zCgxscMGQ-3D-3D) Yours,
Tom [__Puedes leer en español el nuevo plan migratorio de Tom aquí.__](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BUMpSVRCKFPs5N59VGP13YZh7so9fJxqJU1jypcPenH-2FJmAD87k4Cgcar-2BvzdoYGnpSs9a2HhAudPC8n7nhv-2FeuLLyC7qIQNYpcIIzEXuDofhERS2bnrtmPot5yas0heoAr4Ktdc5FM8QgtpWoMisOcVmoQ6oTujPkJ9OCaqav-2FM0oI1cT151cYvWAMEzZ0PoU-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFfVo7wPQ0sBFraSsvQHAUoNr1tf1rUhN99MQM6JvhBKQ-2Fw6IbJpyo4lq2DkVTqScflNKoArtanGbRnl48AdzEbmm8Pi38DPq9hkQGQvxFaVoh-2FukI0FQkA3ORnqSyWi4Y9XFvtjpG0ebGBOk8gq8DpJS9dtroj-2FmpPXn-2FYG6P-2Fe5-2BP8SfepUsd-2Bb702Ums9KJXgnOCvZgBtymITP-2FUfL-2F6k-2BPVGC7WZvJEGndZUhnegi-2B9JeuO97rAonJmmHpaTwwpDgcCB6f58gnMlrTmd429qGCKgZWhYl3M3KvB8l-2BD6noZhK3MnrVhwVODT-2Bt59HShc7aW6DmkWxeBv2xdutHpvOUxdMQFA5-2FSNX4f-2BncQakw-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | Friend, America prides itself on compassion, hard work, unity, and freedom. But our current immigration system doesn’t reflect these values. I said it on the debate stage last month, and I’ll say it again: Donald Trump isn’t against immigration — he’s against immigration by non-white people. And although his policies have intensified the xenophobic atmosphere we are living in, immigrants were being vilified in this country long before he assumed office. This has to change. We need to heal from the unjust, violent approach to immigration we’ve taken in the past. We must offer everyone seeking a new opportunity here the chance to thrive. We can’t pretend to be a great nation when there are children dying in cages at our southern border. We can’t talk about the American Dream while millions of undocumented workers who make our economy strong live in a constant state of anxiety about being deported. We can’t preach unity and freedom when people are hunted for their status and aren’t given an equal voice in our democracy. The words inscribed on the side of the Statue of Liberty say: “Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free.” Yours, Tom | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! subject: Shoulder to shoulder
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Six more years of Mitch McConnell's right-hand man?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890782/7f51f7bc/4ae16ae5/4ef02cba/1061468661/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

For nearly two decades, Senator John Cornyn has prioritized the demands of his party leaders in Washington over the needs of Texans. As McConnell's right-hand man, Senator Cornyn has played a key role in advancing his harmful agenda -- McConnell even praised Senator Cornyn, saying "it's been a pleasure to stand shoulder to shoulder with him." | **" It's been a pleasure to stand shoulder to shoulder with [Senator Cornyn.]"**
\-- Senate Majority Leader's Website

[**Make a donation to help defeat Mitch McConnell 's right-hand man >>>**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890782/7f51f7bc/4ae16ae5/4ef02cb9/1061468661/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200110.2nd__736__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890782/7f51f7bc/4ae16ae5/4ef02cb8/1061468661/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200110.2nd__736__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890782/7f51f7bc/4ae16ae5/4ef02cbf/1061468661/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200110.2nd__736__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $20.20>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890782/7f51f7bc/4ae16ae5/4ef02cbe/1061468661/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200110.2nd__736__&amount=20.20")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890782/7f51f7bc/4ae16ae5/4ef02cbd/1061468661/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200110.2nd__736__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890782/7f51f7bc/4ae16ae5/4ef02cbc/1061468661/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200110.2nd__736__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890782/7f51f7bc/4ae16ae5/4ef02cb3/1061468661/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200110.2nd__736__")**
Senator Cornyn voted to gut protections for millions of Texans with pre-existing conditions and to allow insurance companies to charge older Texans more for health care coverage **because McConnell and his insurance industry backers wanted it.**

On immigration, Senator Cornyn has stood in the way of just about every sensible solution that's come before the Senate. **When a bipartisan immigration reform bill passed with more than a two-thirds majority, Senator Cornyn joined Mitch McConnell to vote against it.

[Donate to help us defeat McConnell's deputy >>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890782/7f51f7bc/4ae16ae5/4ef02cb9/1061468661/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200110.2nd__736__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

We can't afford another six years of a senator who will advance Mitch McConnell's agenda, who refuses to defend our access to health care, and who stands in the way of badly needed progress on major issues affecting working Texans. **[Rush a donation now>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890782/7f51f7bc/4ae16ae5/4ef02cb9/1061468661/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200110.2nd__736__&amount=10&recurring=true")

MJ is different. She's not a career politician laser-focused on getting elected, then reelected, over and over again. From taking on the government to open ground combat roles in the military to women, to flying rescue missions in Afghanistan, she has always been focused on fighting for what's right. With your help, she'll do the same in the U.S. Senate.

[Will you make a donation to make sure that MJ is the candidate who faces off against -- and beats -- Senator Cornyn next November?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890782/7f51f7bc/4ae16ae5/4ef02cb9/1061468661/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200110.2nd__736__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks,

Preston Elliott
Campaign Manager

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890782/7f51f7bc/4ae16ae5/4ef02cb9/1061468661/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200110.2nd__736__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: The Electoral College has cheated 4 Democrats out of the White House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Donald Trump did not win the real 2016 election. He lost the popular vote by nearly 3 million votes \-- and yet, he's still the president, thanks to the Electoral College. This system of electing the president is a remnant of a bygone era when wealthy landowners didn't trust voters and wanted to preserve power for themselves. We must abolish this system and restore American democracy to the hands of the voters. Otherwise, Democrats risk losing the White House AGAIN. [**If you agree that we need to abolish the Electoral College so we don 't have a repeat of 2016 and elect another Donald Trump, add your name to ours and demand that our presidential elections respect the will of the American people!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfd7/6e9863e8/17aeec92/1db04159/2332151433/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/abolish-electoral-college/wdtop/") Thank you, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfd7/6e9863e8/17aeec92/1db04159/2332151433/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/abolish-electoral-college/wdtop/")

body:

---
Dear Friend, Rick participated in the first of several Democratic candidate forums last night sponsored by the Limestone County NAACP and the Limestone County Democrats and __he absolutely nailed it__. Rick's command of the full breadth of issues, his ability to articulate his positions, and the experience of having already run a Congressional campaign were clear differentiators. As always though, his first question after the event was "how can we do better?" In other exciting news - we've got merchandise! Yard signs and t-shirts are now available. Just click on the images below to hop over to the merchandise page. Also - if you've got a spot for a big four-foot by eight-foot sign just respond to this email and let us know. We'll work with you to get one out to you. clean_body: Forums! Debates! Merchandise! | = Dear Friend, Rick participated in the first of several Democratic candidate forums last night sponsored by the Limestone County NAACP and the Limestone County Democrats and he absolutely nailed it. Rick's command of the full breadth of issues, his ability to articulate his positions, and the experience of having already run a Congressional campaign were clear differentiators. As always though, his first question after the event was "how can we do better?" In other exciting news - we've got merchandise! Yard signs and t-shirts are now available. Just click on the images below to hop over to the merchandise page. Also - if you've got a spot for a big four-foot by eight-foot sign just respond to this email and let us know. We'll work with you to get one out to you. = = And of course we need your support to carry us through this sprint to the primary and on to the general election. = or one of the buttons below to chip in what you can. name: Michael Bennet

body:
| |
---
| Friend: [In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign, but first let me tell you why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba807/134673f2/8ec4760/69977873/2018983494/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

When my team announced that we needed to raise $700,000 by January 16th, we knew it would be a tough goal to hit.

I crunched the numbers with my finance team, and I wanted to keep you updated:

[We need to raise $100,000 over this weekend in order to stay on track to hit our goal by Thursday.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba807/134673f2/8ec4760/69977873/2018983494/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Making your first donation today would make a huge impact. Any amount you donate today will help us reach this crucial goal. Friends, I'm asking, will you chip in today? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba807/134673f2/8ec4760/69977873/2018983494/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba807/134673f2/8ec4760/69977876/2018983494/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

It's no secret that I've been an underdog in this race.

So far, we've gotten by on a shoestring budget by being smart and scrappy.

But now is the time to dig in and work together to reach this crucial goal, team.

[If we keep airing our ads, knocking doors, and reaching out to the 67% of Democratic voters still undecided in this race - we can win in New Hampshire.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba807/134673f2/8ec4760/69977873/2018983494/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[I'm counting on this team to step up and help us hit our goal by Sunday. I know we can do it. Can you make your first donation right now?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba807/134673f2/8ec4760/69977873/2018983494/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[We need to raise $100,000 over this weekend in order to stay on track to hit our goal by Thursday.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba804/134673f2/8eee9be/69977809/3469141411/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011020_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Making your first donation today would make a huge impact. Any amount you donate today will help us reach this crucial goal. Friends, I'm asking, will you chip in today? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba804/134673f2/8eee9be/69977809/3469141411/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011020_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

body:

---
| | | **Let's Take Back the House!**
---
| We're off to a running start in 2020 to make sure conservatives have a solid choice for their next Congressman to represent Eastern Kansas. Democrats have already chosen their candidate to join Nancy Pelosi's squad and we cannot afford to give them any ground if we stand any chance at taking the House back.

[Will you pitch in to help us take back the House in 2020?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=b1c325594b&e=1050d051da)

Jake LaTurner is the only candidate with the resolve and the record to beat the Democratic candidate and keep the seat red. Read about his campaign promises [here](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=bf3eecfd98&e=1050d051da).

Kansas is a conservative Republican state and must send a conservative Republican fighter to D.C. to represent us. Any other candidate puts the seat at risk.

It's a risk we simply cannot take.

Show your support today with [a donation](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e6f0ffcb7e&e=1050d051da) to Kansans for LaTurner to kick off the new year. We will work harder than any other candidate, Republican or Democrat, and put your dollars to good use in this very important race.

Thank you for your support!

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Congress has failed to secure the border.
body:
We need to elect people who will. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/97c01d0a9a3b/calling-all-patriots-12062025?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=a202a0739a&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=b543d24e21&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Peter,
The crisis at the border is Congress' fault.

They may not like hearing it. They may make excuses. But at the end of the day our constitution, the greatest political document ever written, vests the power to legislate with Congress and Congress alone.

Our lax laws have created a porous border that has led to unprecedented levels of illegal border crossings, made narcoterrorism profitable, and made Americans less safe and secure.

We need to get Kendra Horn and the other impeachment-first Democrats out of office so we can refocus Congress on the bread-and-butter issues that really matter to Americans.

When elected to Congress I plan to make building the wall with President Trump a number one priority. [**If you think Congress sorely needs to wake up and solve this problem, please consider donating just $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to our campaign to flip Oklahoma's 5th district.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=db37e065b7&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=15e85d15a6&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Kendra Horn is not the voice of Oklahomans. She voted to impeach the president and nullify the will of each citizen who voted for Donald Trump.

Horn was lauded by the liberal media for her “courage” on what was labeled a “tough vote”. Now Horn is trying to redeem herself in the eyes of Oklahomans by voting "no" on a non-binding resolution in Congress this week that would have restricted the President's ability to defend our homeland.

But Oklahomans are smart enough to see through her ruse. Her constant votes for amnesty and open borders show her true colors on national security.

**National Journal says this is the nation's #1 battleground district.**

AP has called Oklahoma's 5th district "a seat both parties expect to work fiercely to win in 2020.”

Decision Desk HQ has said "OK-5 is guaranteed to be one of 2020's most bitterly fought House elections."

Oklahoma's 5th district is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House in 2020. [**That's why we need your help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=1baf80b197&e=795c6d9796)

[**Please co ntribute $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to help us take back the House for conservatives, fight the Swamp, and secure the border.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ddfd2a6066&e=795c6d9796)

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=eeaef90e24&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=7f8a491386&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---

---

name: Elisa Cardnell
subject: This is an outrage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
I am in shock
Peter,
**Refugee - a person who has been forced to leave their home country in order to escape war, persecution, or natural disaster.**
Governor Abbott is no longer allowing refugees in Texas. People — children and families — are running from their home countries because they have nowhere else to turn, and Abbott wants us to turn our backs on them.
[_**This is not what American or Texas values are all about y’all. Sign our petition and stand up to hate >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13780240/143587912/-2135538609?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTE4MWI2OS0wZTM0LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YpqCUcFV3UXNWSkmqC7kiF2P9UflM92Um6KLL9uBVG0=&emci=9f1ae104-0c34-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=3a181b69-0e34-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=8311474)
Greg Abbott and I have something in common — we were both born as US citizens. It wasn’t because we worked hard or because we earned it. It was pure luck.
**How dare he abandon the hundreds of thousands of refugees in their most desperate time?** This will tear apart families and rip decision making power away from hundreds of communities.
[_**Stand with us against this injustice. Sign our petition >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13780241/143587913/-2135538609?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTE4MWI2OS0wZTM0LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YpqCUcFV3UXNWSkmqC7kiF2P9UflM92Um6KLL9uBVG0=&emci=9f1ae104-0c34-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=3a181b69-0e34-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=8311474)
We can’t allow this to go on,
Elisa Cardnell
****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13780242/143587914/-2135538609?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTE4MWI2OS0wZTM0LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YpqCUcFV3UXNWSkmqC7kiF2P9UflM92Um6KLL9uBVG0=&emci=9f1ae104-0c34-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=3a181b69-0e34-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=8311474)****

name: Matt Klapper, Cory 2020
subject: A few ways to help us with the Iowa caucuses without leaving your house:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Cory always says, "I will ask more from you than any president has ever asked from you in your life." Well team, that starts now. Team, we are just 24 days away from the Iowa Caucuses, and the other early states follow soon after. After all the hard work we've been doing -- the conversations we've had, the crowds Cory has connected with, the people this campaign has inspired -- it all comes down to this. Cory always says, "I will ask more from you than any president has ever asked from you in your life." Well, team, that starts now. Time is running out to reach folks in the early states. Will you sign up to make a few phone calls? We have shifts starting as soon as tomorrow. **[Click here to sign up.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fe4/5fca0d19/7b7cfab1/291d245b/1873361866/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.mobilize.us/corybooker/event/188805/?utm_source=em_20200110_MK")** This all leads up to the final few days before the caucuses on February 3rd, when we need to have as many conversations with Iowans as possible to make sure they show up for Cory. Can we count on you to make calls during our Get-Out-The-Caucus weekend? **[Click here to sign up for as many shifts as possible.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fe4/5fca0d19/7b7cfab1/291d245a/1873361866/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.mobilize.us/corybooker/event/194234/?utm_source=em_20200110_MK")** We're counting on our volunteer team across the country to make calls so our team on the ground can focus on knocking on doors. And don't worry, we'll give you the training and materials you need to make calls from home. We can't do this without you. Matt Matt Klapper
Senior Advisor
Cory 2020 _P.S. If you're able, we also need folks to "Book-It" to Iowa and join our efforts on the ground. **[Click here to sign up.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/book-it-to-iowa?source=em_su_20200110_MK_20200110-su-MK-phonebanking-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fe4/5fca0d19/7b7cfab1/291d2458/1873361866/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fe4/5fca0d19/7b7cfab1/291d24a7/1873361866/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fe4/5fca0d19/7b7cfab1/291d24a6/1873361866/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fe4/5fca0d19/7b7cfab1/291d24a5/1873361866/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fe4/5fca0d19/7b7cfab1/291d24a4/1873361866/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fe4/5fca0d19/7b7cfab1/291d2458/1873361866/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: The Second protects the rest.
body:
Some candidates are squeamish about the Second Amendment. Not me. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/this-impeachment-drama-is-hurting-america-1523909?e=90fad69796)
---
| | [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=1212370416&e=90fad69796)
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=e4ec57b7e0&e=90fad69796)
---
| | Peter, Some candidates are squeamish about defending the Second Amendment. Not me. I'm a proud gun owner and handgun carry permit holder.

I'm such a strong believer in the Second Amendment that while other candidates dance around their support of gun rights, I just set up at gun shows to talk to voters. Here's a picture of me at one recently.
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=c80cdf7742&e=90fad69796)
---
| [Donate Now ›](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=101afda2a8&e=90fad69796 "Donate Now ›")
---
| We need a Congressman from IA-02 who supports gun rights as much as Iowans do. I've always fought for the Second Amendment and plan on continuing to do in Congress.

[**If you support our Second Amendment rights and want Congress to back off its gun-grabbing, please consider donating $5, $25, $50, or even $100 to help us flip this district red in 2020.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=2cefdea0d6&e=90fad69796) Gun-grabbing Democrats don't respect the Second Amendment.

This is a conservative district. It voted for President Trump by five points in 2016. We can flip it, I'm sure of it, but it's going to take resources that the other side is going to have in spades from the coasts.

There are only a few dozen competitive House races each year, and my race in IA-02 is going to be one of the most competitive. If we want to win the House back, we must win Iowa's 2nd Congressional District.

[**Please consider donating $5, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or anything you can today so that we can flip IA-02 and fight for the Second Amendment. **](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=4a60ff6775&e=90fad69796)

For Iowa,
[](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=0c608fe611&e=90fad69796)
Bobby Schilling
---

---
| | [](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=811afb3d0c&e=90fad69796)

name: Hickenlooper 2020
subject: You know it. We know it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
| | Folks, our campaign is facing our very first fundraising deadline of the new year (and arguably our most important!). But we're still on a bit of a slower pace than usual and need to double down to make up for lost ground. You know it. We know it. Colorado is the Democrats' best chance to flip a seat and take back the Senate, so we're turning to you: **[Donate $10 or more right now to help us reach our critical $100,000 goal, take back Colorado, and bring Democrats one step closer to the Senate majority>>](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200110-lme-lift?refcode=em-200110-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** | [DONATE](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200110-lme-lift?refcode=em-200110-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
_\---------- Forwarded message from John Hickenlooper ----------_
Folks,
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to rush a critical donation to our campaign before next week's mid-month fundraising deadline. Please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important.
I probably don't need to tell you how important this Colorado Senate race is if Democrats want to take back the Senate. In fact, our race is one of the most likely Senate seats to flip in 2020 right now.
But it's going to take a whole lot of grassroots donations to overcome the fundraising advantage that's been gifted to our opponent by Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's rolodex of far-right billionaire megadonors.
**And the truth is, our fundraising this month has gotten off to a rough start -- bringing in about 32% fewer individual donations than at this point last month.**
Now, it's not an emergency. I'm not looking to freak anybody out. I'm just telling you the truth because we need to get caught back up in the next few days. So we're setting a goal to raise $100,000 in the next week from grassroots Democrats like you. That's why I'm personally asking...
**Can I count on you to make a donation of $10 or more to our campaign today? Your support will immediately go toward winning this race and give us a chance to finally get things done for everyday people:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200110-lme-lift?refcode=em-200110-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200110-lme-lift?refcode=em-200110-full&amount=25&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200110-lme-lift?refcode=em-200110-full&amount=50&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200110-lme-lift?refcode=em-200110-full&amount=100&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200110-lme-lift?refcode=em-200110-full&amount=250&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200110-lme-lift?refcode=em-200110-full&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
At the end of this campaign, I want people to say that we won this race the right way. That's why your contribution of any amount is so important to our team today.
Thanks for all you do.
-- John

Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---
P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
[Unsubscribe here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771523/691c9bd/6f6c8c29/11a7364b/1748029459/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Michael Bennet HQ
subject: This is a fundraising email, but we need you to take a look
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| [Hey - can you spare $5 for Senator Michael Bennet?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba83e/134673f2/8e13ca3/69977ac3/2106448821/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_011020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") We're sorry to be so direct, but we extended our ad buy, and now we're racing the clock to raise enough money to keep our new ads on the air:

* If we fall short, we won't be able to stay on the airwaves in New Hampshire.

* If we don't run our ads, we won't reach the 67% of undecided voters with Michael's message about building opportunity for the next generation.

---
Since launching our TV ads, we've seen a spike in polling numbers and search traffic - these ads are having a direct impact, and we can't afford to take our foot off the gas, team.

Whether you've never donated before or donate every month, this is the most critical moment for our campaign yet. It's going to take everyone reading this chipping in whatever you can afford to hit our goal.

[So can you donate right now to help keep Michael's new ads on the air?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba83e/134673f2/8e13ca3/69977ac3/2106448821/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_011020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
| | [CHIP IN $5 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba83e/134673f2/8e13ca3/69977ac2/2106448821/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_011020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
Trump Wins His Standoff with Iran | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=74ffc27a20&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Trump Wins His Standoff with Iran**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=07e5fe248e&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Post_
“When Trump drew his red line—warning Tehran that if it killed even one American, the United States would respond militarily against Iran—the regime never expected him to enforce it. His decision to kill Soleimani clearly stunned Ayatollah Ali Khamenei and left his regime chastened,” Marc Thiessen writes.

**Press Secretary:** [Biased media was practically “mourning” for Soleimani](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6235175990&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Record 158,803,000 Americans Employed; 1.85M Year-to-Year Increase**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c0bd85e1cd&e=3ee4985eea)
-_CNSNews_
Today’s jobs report brings more good news: “The number of employed Americans—158,803,000—set a 25th record under President Trump . . . In December, the number of unemployed Americans, 5,753,000, matched the Trump-era low set in September 2019. The unemployment rate remained at its 50-year low of 3.5 percent,” Susan Jones reports.

**MORE:** [Wages are rising fastest for blue-collar Americans!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f00168e6ca&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Washington Tries, And Fails, To Defend Nancy Pelosi’s Failed Impeachment Strategy**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eef901774e&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Federalist_
“In the immediate aftermath of Nancy Pelosi’s decision to hold the Articles of Impeachment rather than send them to the Senate, not even the most pro-Pelosi hacks in existence could make the case for the strategy. The same question ping-ponged through DC greenrooms: ‘Is she really doing this?’” Ben Domenech writes.

[Wasn’t impeachment supposed to be “urgent”?](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=77d26f38ad&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Nancy Pelosi’s Pointless War-Powers Ploy**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b6ae3d6d7d&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“Speaker Nancy Pelosi just pushed through a bill aiming to limit President Trump’s ability to hit Iran, even though the crisis is over. Why? Thursday’s House passage of her war-powers resolution is almost certainly pure symbolism. Nothing like this is going to pass the Senate, and even if it did its constitutional status would be dubious,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| [**Ivanka Trump Talks Investment in U.S. Jobs in CES Keynote, Gets Warm Reception**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7adf4183b3&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Variety_
“Ivanka Trump talked about the current and future state of the U.S. workforce at CES — an appearance that was met with a fair amount of enthusiasm among the tech-industry attendees. In a keynote session Tuesday at CES in Las Vegas, the daughter of and adviser to President Donald Trump said the administration has worked to put in place multiple programs to retrain American workers and is looking for new ways to bring people into the workforce,” Todd Spangler reports.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f53662027a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2567365dd2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=2dc845696e)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: Ruth Bader Ginsburg: Cancer-free and ready to take names
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:

| | Peter, we've got great news: Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg has said she is cancer-free and has at least 5 more years sitting on the Supreme Court in her. Justice Ginsburg has been a liberal bastion on the conservative court, standing up for abortion rights, marriage equality, DREAMers, and environmental protections. An outspoken critic of Trump, she's repeatedly put him in his place and reminded him that he is not above the law. Today, we're asking Democrats to voice their support and thanks for Ruth Bader Ginsburg for preserving progress and standing up to Trump: **Do you support Ruth Bader Ginsburg?** [**YES**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfd9/6e9863e8/17a82ecb/1db0401e/234010411/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/-iaNJ4FD") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfd9/6e9863e8/17a82ecb/1db0401e/234010411/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/-iaNJ4FD") Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfd9/6e9863e8/17a82ecb/1db0401d/234010411/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200110c.ND&refcode2=HpTgwY6MKvODWlhG2bav")

body:
If you can help us make calls to Iowa caucus-goers between now and Sunday, Elizabeth might call you to thank you. Can she count on you to make calls now? | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ba43/45c30650/1ee59ed2b/66ff5a73/1352797470/VEsH/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com/call")
---
Elizabeth is grateful down to her toes for the grassroots movement we've built together -- and with only 24 days to the Iowa caucuses, she wants to tell you herself.

**If you can help us make calls to Iowa caucus-goers between now and Sunday, Elizabeth might call you to thank you. Can she count on you to make calls now?** | **[**MAKE CALLS NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ba43/45c30650/1ee59ed2b/66ff5a72/1352797470/VEsE/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.elizabethwarren.com/call")**
---

Everyone has a different reason for being in this fight, and sharing your reasons with caucus-goers who might just be tuning in to this race could make all the difference on caucus night.

**So, whether you can start making calls right now, or if you can commit to make calls for Elizabeth this weekend -- after work, during your lunch break, or for just an hour before taking your dog for a walk on Saturday morning -- you can help shape this race.**

**[Click here to get started right now, or sign up for a shift or two this weekend. Then, keep your phone nearby-- Elizabeth might just give you a call to thank you!](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ba43/45c30650/1ee59ed2b/66ff5a72/1352797470/VEsF/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.elizabethwarren.com/call")**

Thanks for being in this fight with us, and remember: If you get a call from an unknown number, pick up -- it might be Elizabeth!

Team Warren

name: Jay Inslee
subject: This is what happens when we ignore climate change.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8404?t=3&akid=8018%2E868730%2EwE6JRa) Friend -- the fires in Australia are a climate disaster. At least 24 people have died since the wildfire season started, and thousands more have been evacuated -- millions of acres of land have been scorched, and thousands of homes have been destroyed. By some estimates, half a billion animals have been killed -- bringing some species to the brink of extinction. I'm heartbroken for the people of Australia. Some people say climate action costs too much. But inaction is costing us, dearly, every day. What's happening right now in Australia is what happens when a government ignores climate change -- and when they're owned by the fossil fuel industry. This is what happens when a government is actively hostile toward climate action. When a political leader holds a lump of coal up in Parliament, laughs, and claims joyously: _This won't hurt you._ Australia's economy relied for years on selling coal to the world -- but an economy reliant on fossil fuels has led to apocalyptic wildfires that have consumed much of the country. Disasters like this will keep happening as long as leaders ignore the threat of climate change. The fact is, climate change is no longer a looming distant threat -- everyone affected by the wildfires in Australia and California, hurricanes on the East Coast, and floods in the Plains can tell you that. _It's happening now._ And it will get worse unless we, especially our leaders, act boldly. This is exactly why Democratic presidential candidates must prioritize climate change and take up my 100% Clean Energy for America plan. Taking on Big Oil and Big Coal is more important than ever and will grow our economy and act in the best interests of our own national security. We'll keep fighting for a permanent, real solution to defeat climate change. Let's be really blunt about this: We can't spend the next century sending out emails asking for people to donate to a charity to respond to every climate disaster. It's not sustainable. It's not the way to build a future worthy of the next generation and the generation after that. But as we fight for global change, Australia needs our help right now. [**You can see the New York Times' list of the ways you can help Australians and Australian wildlife right here,**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8404?t=4&akid=8018%2E868730%2EwE6JRa) **and I hope you'll do whatever you can -- then recommit with me to the fight to defeat climate change in 2020.** Very truly yours, Jay
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=8018%2E868730%2EwE6JRa). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
---

It's happening now. And it will get worse unless we, especially our leaders, act boldly. This is exactly why Democratic presidential candidates must prioritize climate change and take up my 100% Clean Energy for America plan. Taking on Big Oil and Big Coal is more important than ever and will grow our economy and act in the best interests of our own national security. We'll keep fighting for a permanent, real solution to defeat climate change. Let's be really blunt about this: We can't spend the next century sending out emails asking for people to donate to a charity to respond to every climate disaster. It's not sustainable. It's not the way to build a future worthy of the next generation and the generation after that. But as we fight for global change, Australia needs our help right now. and I hope you'll do whatever you can -- then recommit with me to the fight to defeat climate change in 2020. Very truly yours, Jay

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Primary Kickoff!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

I hope you enjoyed your holiday season as much as Emily, Victoria and I did! But now that the holidays are over, it's time to get back to work. Washington needs new leaders to step up and deliver for the American people.

That's why this Sunday, January 12th at 4pm we're hosting our official Primary Election Kickoff!!!

[Click here to RSVP](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=6c17f819ed22428988717e24e25feb15&_e=S5Fa7r75YJPSdKbJ2KHNlTSxiK_gnBc0sLXIZlpTTRAunhwClosbwaeg1KNPk3mk86tz3CI6ipUhTvgdbrNFlhd7TNfzQJDP57AFRxBcCeRlwvrDUiZhUOJn6w6inGkxIt-hOQ4JUl89UT9u3jRqJDg6DpzzyamJe5pQqKpAQl4514A9N9Zwqz-ndYZWQ-U__UbuoE1r-LVPphsn4BsmvAqJBRZXsU_8rNVpeT6CjMvEXY7yAdd-62NKZl9k25_pxjZxWGkCj7GdqEY4w6dj-ZzP4djgIFRRYMZID8YFE3o%3D)

subject: We're better off with Greta fighting for our planet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| Greta Thunberg has worked tirelessly to raise awareness about our planet's climate crisis. It's time for us to thank Greta for all of her hard work in fighting back against the climate crisis. Sign our card to help us thank Greta Thunberg for all of her hard work! [Sign our card to help us thank Greta Thunberg for all of her hard work!](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/sign-greta-thunberg-s-thank-you-card-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Sign+our+card+to+help+us+thank+Greta+Thu&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_90OP_200110_2_2&source=314_EM_PT_90OP_200110_2_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_90OP_200110_2_2") | | [Thank Greta](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/sign-greta-thunberg-s-thank-you-card-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Thank+Greta&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_90OP_200110_2_2&source=314_EM_PT_90OP_200110_2_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_90OP_200110_2_2")

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4380/4bd7760e/4626c535/77acf9dc/908755701/VEsC/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_90OP_200110_2_2&source=314_EM_PT_90OP_200110_2_2")** to make a donation.
